Instead, we propose a more intuitive pointing mechanism that directly selects the visual tokens that contain the target concept. Our model generates a special pointing token that cross-attends to the input image or video tokens and selects the appropriate one. To make this model more fine-grained, we follow these pointing tokens with an additional special token that selects a fine-grained subpatch within the initially selected region, and then a third token that specifies a location within that subpatch. We further show that performance improves by generating points sequentially in a consistent order, encoding the relative position of the previously selected point, and including a special no-more-points class when selecting visual tokens. Using this method, we set a new state-of-the-art on image pointing (70.7% on PointBench), set a new state-of-the-art among fully open models on GUI pointing (61.1% on ScreenSpotPro), and improve video pointing (59.1% human preference win rate vs. a text coordinate baseline) and tracking (+6.3% gain on Molmo2Track). We additionally show that our method achieves much higher sample efficiency and discuss the qualitative differences that emerge from this design change.

深度解读

这篇论文主要想解决什么问题？这个问题在现实或研究中为什么重要？: 现有的视觉语言模型通过生成文本坐标来指向，导致需要学习复杂的坐标系且输出 token 数量高。这个问题在现实中很重要，因为指向能力直接应用于机器人抓取导航、计算机用户代理与图形界面交互以及链式思维任务中。该方案通过直接选择视觉标记，减少了 token 数量，提高了样本效率，并使视觉识别与指向更紧密耦合。

作者是如何思考并设计出这个方法的？是否有借鉴现有工作？: 作者观察到现有 VLM 通过生成文本坐标来指向，这种方式需要学习复杂的坐标系且消耗大量 token。他们设计了一种更直观的机制，通过生成特殊的“指向 token”直接选择包含目标概念的视觉 token。为了提高精度，他们采用从粗到细的三步流程：先用 token 选择图像块，再用 token 选择子块，最后用 token 确定子块内的具体位置。此外，他们还利用相对位置编码保持点的顺序，并引入“无更多点”类来防止模型生成过多点。是的，作者借鉴了现有工作。他们参考了用于图像分割或深度估计的“Grounding tokens”方法，但指出自己的方法通过轻量级投影器解码，而非预训练解码器。此外，他们还借鉴了 PaDT 的思路，即通过词汇表 token 交叉注意力到视觉 token，但他们的方法利用空间位置进行指向，而 PaDT 使用解码器获取边界框。同时，他们使用了 CoSyn 的代码引导数据生成方法来构建 GUI 数据集。

这个方法的核心思想是什么？整体实现流程是怎样的？: 核心思想是直接选择包含目标概念的视觉标记，而不是生成坐标。整体实现流程是：模型先发出一个标记选择图像或视频中的一个粗粒度区域，接着发出另一个标记在该区域内选择更细的子区域，最后发出标记在该子区域内确定具体位置。此外，模型会按顺序生成点，并使用特殊标记表示不再继续指向。

论文的关键创新点有哪些？相比之前的工作，有什么不同？: 论文的关键创新点在于提出了一种新的“grounding tokens”机制，通过生成<PATCH>、<SUBPATCH>和<LOCATION>三个特殊token，直接从输入图像或视频中选取视觉token来定位目标。相比之前通过生成文本坐标的方法，它不需要学习复杂的坐标系，输出token更少，且能更紧密地结合视觉识别与指向，从而提高了效率和泛化能力。

如果要用一句话总结这篇论文的贡献，你会怎么说？: 这篇论文提出了一种新的视觉语言模型指向机制，通过生成特殊的指向 token 直接选择视觉 token，从而无需学习复杂的坐标系并降低输出 token 数量。该方法在图像、GUI 和视频指向任务上均取得了新的性能最佳结果。

Abstract

Grounding has become a fundamental capability of vision-language models (VLMs). Most existing VLMs point by generating coordinates as part of their text output, which requires learning a complicated coordinate system and results in a high token count. Instead, we propose a more intuitive pointing mechanism that directly selects the visual tokens that contain the target concept. Our model generates a special pointing token that cross-attends to the input image or video tokens and selects the appropriate one. To make this model more fine-grained, we follow these pointing tokens with an additional special token that selects a fine-grained subpatch within the initially selected region, and then a third token that specifies a location within that subpatch. We further show that performance improves by generating points sequentially in a consistent order, encoding the relative position of the previously selected point, and including a special no-more-points class when selecting visual tokens. Using this method, we set a new state-of-the-art on image pointing (70.7% on PointBench), set a new state-of-the-art among fully open models on GUI pointing (61.1% on ScreenSpotPro), and improve video pointing (59.1% human preference win rate vs. a text coordinate baseline) and tracking (+6.3% gain on Molmo2Track). We additionally show that our method achieves much higher sample efficiency and discuss the qualitative differences that emerge from this design change.

item.title: GEMS: Agent-Native Multimodal Generation with Memory and Skills
item.author: Zefeng He, Siyuan Huang, Xiaoye Qu, Yafu Li, Tong Zhu, Yu Cheng, Yang Yang
item.description:
来源: arxiv

GPT 基础摘要

总结: GEMS是一个基于Agent的框架，旨在解决多模态生成模型在复杂指令和专用下游任务上的局限性。

背景: 尽管通用多模态生成模型取得了显著进展，但在处理复杂指令和专用下游任务时仍面临困难。

目的: 提出GEMS框架，旨在超越基础模型在通用和下游任务上的固有局限。

方法: GEMS包含三个核心组件：Agent Loop（通过迭代优化提升生成质量）、Agent Memory（存储事实状态和经验摘要的持久化记忆）和Agent Skill（可扩展的领域专业知识集合）。

主要发现: 在五个主流任务和四个下游任务上，GEMS在多个生成后端上持续取得显著性能提升；特别是轻量级6B模型Z-Image-Turbo在GenEval2上超越了最先进的Nano Banana 2。

结论: GEMS证明了利用Agent机制可以有效扩展模型能力，使其超越原始限制。

翻译: Recent multimodal generation models have achieved remarkable progress on general-purpose generation tasks, yet continue to struggle with complex instructions and specialized downstream tasks. Inspired by the success of advanced agent frameworks such as Claude Code, we propose GEMS (Agent-Native Multimodal GEneration with Memory and Skills), a framework that pushes beyond the inherent limitations of foundational models on both general and downstream tasks. GEMS is built upon three core components. Agent Loop introduces a structured multi-agent framework that iteratively improves generation quality through closed-loop optimization. Agent Memory provides a persistent, trajectory-level memory that hierarchically stores both factual states and compressed experiential summaries, enabling a global view of the optimization process while reducing redundancy. Agent Skill offers an extensible collection of domain-specific expertise with on-demand loading, allowing the system to effectively handle diverse downstream applications. Across five mainstream tasks and four downstream tasks, evaluated on multiple generative backends, GEMS consistently achieves significant performance gains. Most notably, it enables the lightweight 6B model Z-Image-Turbo to surpass the state-of-the-art Nano Banana 2 on GenEval2, demonstrating the effectiveness of agent harness in extending model capabilities beyond their original limits.

Abstract

Recent multimodal generation models have achieved remarkable progress on general-purpose generation tasks, yet continue to struggle with complex instructions and specialized downstream tasks. Inspired by the success of advanced agent frameworks such as Claude Code, we propose \textbf{GEMS} (Agent-Native Multimodal \textbf{GE}neration with \textbf{M}emory and \textbf{S}kills), a framework that pushes beyond the inherent limitations of foundational models on both general and downstream tasks. GEMS is built upon three core components. Agent Loop introduces a structured multi-agent framework that iteratively improves generation quality through closed-loop optimization. Agent Memory provides a persistent, trajectory-level memory that hierarchically stores both factual states and compressed experiential summaries, enabling a global view of the optimization process while reducing redundancy. Agent Skill offers an extensible collection of domain-specific expertise with on-demand loading, allowing the system to effectively handle diverse downstream applications. Across five mainstream tasks and four downstream tasks, evaluated on multiple generative backends, GEMS consistently achieves significant performance gains. Most notably, it enables the lightweight 6B model Z-Image-Turbo to surpass the state-of-the-art Nano Banana 2 on GenEval2, demonstrating the effectiveness of agent harness in extending model capabilities beyond their original limits.

item.title: To View Transform or Not to View Transform: NeRF-based Pre-training Perspective
item.author: Hyeonjun Jeong, Juyeb Shin, Dongsuk Kum
item.description:
来源: arxiv | ⭐ 与研究主题相关

GPT 基础摘要

总结: 本文提出了一种新的基于点云的3D检测器NeRP3D，旨在解决NeRF预训练方法中因视图变换与辐射场假设冲突导致的3D表示模糊和歧义问题，同时保留预训练的NeRF网络以提升下游任务性能。

背景: NeRFs已成为自动驾驶中增强3D几何和外观理解的主流预训练范式。然而，将NeRF应用于从视图变换获得的体素特征时，视图变换的离散刚性表示与辐射场的连续自适应函数假设存在冲突，导致3D表示模糊和歧义，限制了场景理解。此外，预训练的NeRF网络在下游任务中被丢弃，导致增强的3D表示利用效率低下。

目的: 提出一种新的NeRF-Resembled Point-based 3D detector（NeRP3D），以学习连续的3D表示，避免视图变换带来的不匹配先验，并保留预训练的NeRF网络以实现更高效的利用。

方法: NeRP3D是一种基于点云的3D检测器，它能够学习连续的3D表示，从而避免视图变换带来的不匹配先验。该方法保留了预训练的NeRF网络，无论下游任务如何，都继承了连续3D表示学习的原则。

主要发现: 在nuScenes数据集上的实验表明，该方法显著优于之前的最佳方法，不仅在预训练场景重建任务中表现良好，在下游检测任务中也表现优异。

结论: NeRP3D通过保留预训练的NeRF网络并学习连续的3D表示，有效解决了视图变换与辐射场假设冲突的问题，显著提升了3D感知性能，为场景重建和检测任务带来了更大的潜力。

翻译: Neural radiance fields (NeRFs) has emerged as a prominent pre-training paradigm for vision-centric autonomous driving, which enhances 3D geometry and appearance understanding in a fully self-supervised manner. To apply NeRF-based pretraining to 3D perception models, recent approaches have simply applied NeRFs to volumetric features obtained from view transformation. However, coupling NeRFs with view transformation inherits conflicting priors; view transformation imposes discrete and rigid representations, whereas radiance fields assume continuous and adaptive functions. When these opposing assumptions are forced into a single pipeline, the misalignment surfaces as blurry and ambiguous 3D representations that ultimately limit 3D scene understanding. Moreover, the NeRF network for pre-training is discarded during downstream tasks, resulting in inefficient utilization of enhanced 3D representations through NeRF. In this paper, we propose a novel NeRF-Resembled Point-based 3D detector that can learn continuous 3D representation and thus avoid the misaligned priors from view transformation. NeRP3D preserves the pre-trained NeRF network regardless of the tasks, inheriting the principle of continuous 3D representation learning and leading to greater potentials for both scene reconstruction and detection tasks. Experiments on nuScenes dataset demonstrate that our proposed approach significantly improves previous state-of-the-art methods, outperforming not only pretext scene reconstruction tasks but also downstream detection tasks.

深度解读

这篇论文主要想解决什么问题？这个问题在现实或研究中为什么重要？: 论文主要解决现有方法将NeRF与视图变换结合时产生的冲突先验问题，即视图变换的离散刚性表示与NeRF的连续自适应函数不匹配，导致3D表示模糊且不准确，且预训练NeRF在下游任务中被丢弃，造成资源浪费。这在自动驾驶中至关重要，因为精细的3D场景理解是3D目标检测、地图构建等任务的基础，解决此问题能避免物体坍缩成模糊团块，显著提升感知性能。

作者是如何思考并设计出这个方法的？是否有借鉴现有工作？: 作者发现将NeRF与视图变换结合存在“冲突的先验假设”，即视图变换的离散刚性限制了NeRF的连续自适应能力，导致3D表示模糊，且现有方法丢弃了预训练的NeRF。因此，作者设计了NeRP3D，直接建模连续的3D特征，保留预训练的NeRF网络以继承连续表示学习的原则。作者借鉴了NeRF和视图变换的相关工作，特别是针对将NeRF集成到预训练中但存在上述缺陷的现有方法。

这个方法的核心思想是什么？整体实现流程是怎样的？: 该方法的核心思想是解决 NeRF 与视图变换结合时产生的冲突先验问题。它通过直接建模连续的 3D 特征，避免了视图变换带来的离散和刚性约束，从而获得更清晰的 3D 理解。同时，它保留了预训练的 NeRF 网络，使其在下游任务中也能利用连续且精细的表示。整体实现流程分为预训练和下游任务两个阶段。在预训练阶段，沿着光线采样 3D 点，利用 2D 图像特征获取点特征，并使用 RGB 恢复和深度监督优化场景。在下游任务阶段，直接在 3D 空间中均匀采样点，利用预训练的连续表示进行检测或占用预测。

论文的关键创新点有哪些？相比之前的工作，有什么不同？: 论文提出了NeRP3D，这是一种基于NeRF的点基3D检测器。其关键创新在于直接建模连续的3D特征，从而避免了视图变换带来的冲突先验。此外，它保留了预训练的NeRF网络，而不是在下游任务中丢弃，从而能更好地利用增强的3D表示。相比之前的工作，它不依赖刚性的体素表示，而是使用连续函数，并且统一了场景重建和感知任务。

如果要用一句话总结这篇论文的贡献，你会怎么说？: 论文提出了 NeRP3D，通过直接建模连续的 3D 表示来避免视图变换带来的冲突先验，并保留了预训练的 NeRF 网络，从而提升了 3D 场景理解和下游感知任务的效果。

Abstract

Neural radiance fields (NeRFs) have emerged as a prominent pre-training paradigm for vision-centric autonomous driving, which enhances 3D geometry and appearance understanding in a fully self-supervised manner. To apply NeRF-based pretraining to 3D perception models, recent approaches have simply applied NeRFs to volumetric features obtained from view transformation. However, coupling NeRFs with view transformation inherits conflicting priors; view transformation imposes discrete and rigid representations, whereas radiance fields assume continuous and adaptive functions. When these opposing assumptions are forced into a single pipeline, the misalignment surfaces as blurry and ambiguous 3D representations that ultimately limit 3D scene understanding. Moreover, the NeRF network for pre-training is discarded during downstream tasks, resulting in inefficient utilization of enhanced 3D representations through NeRF. In this paper, we propose a novel NeRF-Resembled Point-based 3D detector that can learn continuous 3D representation and thus avoid the misaligned priors from view transformation. NeRP3D preserves the pre-trained NeRF network regardless of the tasks, inheriting the principle of continuous 3D representation learning and leading to greater potentials for both scene reconstruction and detection tasks. Experiments on nuScenes dataset demonstrate that our proposed approach significantly improves previous state-of-the-art methods, outperforming not only pretext scene reconstruction tasks but also downstream detection tasks.

item.title: Octree-based Learned Point Cloud Geometry Compression: A Lossy Perspective
item.author: Kaiyu Zheng, Wei Gao, Huiming Zheng
item.description:
来源: arxiv | ⭐ 与研究主题相关

GPT 基础摘要

总结: 针对八叉树点云压缩中无损表示量化调整导致严重失真的问题，提出针对物体点云的叶子节点有损压缩方法和针对激光雷达点云的变比特率控制方法，实验表明前者显著优于传统方法，后者无需微调即可实现约1%的比特率误差。

背景: 八叉树上下文学习是点云压缩的主流方法，但在有损压缩方面的潜力尚未被充分探索。传统的有损压缩范式使用无损八叉树表示配合量化步长调整，由于量化过程中大量点缺失，可能导致严重失真。

目的: 分析不同点云的数据特征，提出专门的有损压缩方法。

方法: 1. 针对物体点云：提出叶子节点有损压缩方法，通过位编码和二进制预测实现有损压缩；2. 针对激光雷达点云：探索变比特率方法，并提出一种简单有效的比特率控制方法。

主要发现: 1. 提出的叶子节点有损压缩方法在物体点云上显著优于之前的八叉树方法；2. 提出的比特率控制方法在激光雷达点云上无需微调即可实现约1%的比特率误差。

结论: 所提出的方法有效解决了传统方法在量化调整时产生的严重失真问题，并在不同类型的点云数据上取得了良好的压缩效果。

翻译: Octree-based context learning has recently become a leading method in point cloud compression. However, its potential on lossy compression remains undiscovered. The traditional lossy compression paradigm using lossless octree representation with quantization step adjustment may result in severe distortions due to massive missing points in quantization. Therefore, we analyze data characteristics of different point clouds and propose lossy approaches specifically. For object point clouds that suffer from quantization step adjustment, we propose a new leaf nodes lossy compression method, which achieves lossy compression by performing bit-wise coding and binary prediction on leaf nodes. For LiDAR point clouds, we explore variable rate approaches and propose a simple but effective rate control method. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed leaf nodes lossy compression method significantly outperforms the previous octree-based method on object point clouds, and the proposed rate control method achieves about 1% bit error without finetuning on LiDAR point clouds.

深度解读

这篇论文主要想解决什么问题？这个问题在现实或研究中为什么重要？: 论文主要解决八叉树点云压缩中缺乏有效有损方法的问题。现有方法通过调整量化步长会导致严重失真，而论文针对对象点云提出叶子节点有损压缩，针对LiDAR点云提出变率控制。这很重要，因为点云数据量巨大，有损压缩能在文件大小减少和可接受的质量降级之间取得平衡，对VR、自动驾驶等实际应用至关重要。

作者是如何思考并设计出这个方法的？是否有借鉴现有工作？: 作者通过分析不同点云的数据特征发现，传统的通过调整量化步长来实现八叉树有损压缩的方法，对物体点云会导致严重失真，但对LiDAR点云效果较好。基于此，针对物体点云，作者提出仅对八叉树的叶子节点进行有损压缩，通过位编码和二进制预测来减少比特率；针对LiDAR点云，则探索了变比特率方法。作者借鉴了现有的基于八叉树的点云压缩方法，如G-PCC、OctAttention等，利用上下文模型进行预测，在此基础上进行了改进。

这个方法的核心思想是什么？整体实现流程是怎样的？: 该方法针对不同点云类型采用差异化策略。核心思想是：对于物体点云，仅对八叉树的叶子节点进行有损压缩，而非叶子节点保持无损，从而避免因量化导致的严重失真；对于LiDAR点云，通过调整量化步长来实现变比特率控制。实现流程上，物体点云先将八叉树分解，无损编码非叶子节点，有损编码叶子节点；LiDAR点云则通过调整量化步长来构建八叉树，以匹配目标比特率。

论文的关键创新点有哪些？相比之前的工作，有什么不同？: 本文针对不同点云特性提出了两种有损压缩方法：一是针对物体点云，通过位编码和二进制预测仅对叶子节点进行有损压缩，避免了传统量化步长调整导致的严重失真；二是针对LiDAR点云，提出了首个八叉树基础的率控制方法。相比之前主要依赖量化步长调整的八叉树有损压缩方法，本文针对物体点云避免了点合并问题，并针对LiDAR点云实现了更灵活的比特率控制。

如果要用一句话总结这篇论文的贡献，你会怎么说？: 本文分析了八叉树点云的数据特征，发现量化步长调整对物体点云效果不佳，因此提出了一种针对物体点云的叶子节点有损压缩方法，以及针对LiDAR点云的率控制方法，以实现更高效的压缩。

Abstract

Octree-based context learning has recently become a leading method in point cloud compression. However, its potential on lossy compression remains undiscovered. The traditional lossy compression paradigm using lossless octree representation with quantization step adjustment may result in severe distortions due to massive missing points in quantization. Therefore, we analyze data characteristics of different point clouds and propose lossy approaches specifically. For object point clouds that suffer from quantization step adjustment, we propose a new leaf nodes lossy compression method, which achieves lossy compression by performing bit-wise coding and binary prediction on leaf nodes. For LiDAR point clouds, we explore variable rate approaches and propose a simple but effective rate control method. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed leaf nodes lossy compression method significantly outperforms the previous octree-based method on object point clouds, and the proposed rate control method achieves about 1% bit error without finetuning on LiDAR point clouds.

item.title: Q-DIVER: Integrated Quantum Transfer Learning and Differentiable Quantum Architecture Search with EEG Data
item.author: Junghoon Justin Park, Yeonghyeon Park, Jiook Cha
item.description:
来源: arxiv

GPT 基础摘要

总结: 本文提出了一种名为Q-DIVER的混合框架，旨在解决深度学习流程中集成量子电路的挑战。

背景: 由于启发式设计限制，将量子电路集成到深度学习流程中仍然具有挑战性。

目的: 提出Q-DIVER框架，结合大规模预训练的EEG编码器（DIVER-1）与可微量子分类器，以实现任务最优电路拓扑的自动发现。

方法: 采用可微量子架构搜索（Differentiable Quantum Architecture Search）方法，在端到端微调过程中自主发现任务最优的电路拓扑结构。

主要发现: 在PhysioNet Motor Imagery数据集上，量子分类器的预测性能与经典多层感知机相当（测试F1: 63.49%），但仅使用了约50倍更少的任务特定头部参数（2.10M vs 105.02M）。

结论: 这些结果验证了量子迁移学习作为一种用于高维生物信号处理的参数高效策略。

翻译: Integrating quantum circuits into deep learning pipelines remains challenging due to heuristic design limitations. We propose Q-DIVER, a hybrid framework combining a large-scale pretrained EEG encoder (DIVER-1) with a differentiable quantum classifier. Unlike fixed-ansatz approaches, we employ Differentiable Quantum Architecture Search to autonomously discover task-optimal circuit topologies during end-to-end fine-tuning. On the PhysioNet Motor Imagery dataset, our quantum classifier achieves predictive performance comparable to classical multi-layer perceptrons (Test F1: 63.49%) while using approximately 50× fewer task-specific head parameters (2.10M vs. 105.02M). These results validate quantum transfer learning as a parameter-efficient strategy for high-dimensional biological signal processing.

Abstract

Integrating quantum circuits into deep learning pipelines remains challenging due to heuristic design limitations. We propose Q-DIVER, a hybrid framework combining a large-scale pretrained EEG encoder (DIVER-1) with a differentiable quantum classifier. Unlike fixed-ansatz approaches, we employ Differentiable Quantum Architecture Search to autonomously discover task-optimal circuit topologies during end-to-end fine-tuning. On the PhysioNet Motor Imagery dataset, our quantum classifier achieves predictive performance comparable to classical multi-layer perceptrons (Test F1: 63.49\%) while using approximately \textbf{50$\times$ fewer task-specific head parameters} (2.10M vs. 105.02M). These results validate quantum transfer learning as a parameter-efficient strategy for high-dimensional biological signal processing.

item.title: RecycleLoRA: Rank-Revealing QR-Based Dual-LoRA Subspace Adaptation for Domain Generalized Semantic Segmentation
item.author: Chanseul Cho, Seokju Yun, Jeaseong Jeon, Seungjae Moon, Youngmin Ro
item.description:
来源: arxiv

GPT 基础摘要

总结: RecycleLoRA是一种用于域泛化语义分割的方法，通过RRQR分解利用视觉基础模型的子空间结构来增强LoRA的表示丰富度，实现跨未见目标域的鲁棒性能。

背景: 现有的域泛化语义分割方法主要关注保留预训练知识，且LoRA组件往往存在表示多样性有限和参数利用效率低的问题。

目的: 提出RecycleLoRA，旨在通过主动利用视觉基础模型中的丰富子空间结构来解决LoRA表示多样性不足和参数利用效率低的问题。

方法: RecycleLoRA采用秩揭示QR分解（RRQR）来系统化地利用VFM的子空间结构。它包含一个主适配器，利用RRQR识别的次要子空间方向学习多样且独立的特征；以及一个子适配器，通过最小调整精细优化主要方向。

主要发现: RRQR初始化的系统化利用使得双适配器能够学习不同的表示，无需额外的正则化损失即可实现互补改进，在合成到真实和真实到真实的泛化任务上均达到最先进的性能。

结论: RecycleLoRA通过RRQR分解实现了优越的域泛化性能，无需复杂的架构或额外的推理延迟。

翻译: 摘要：域泛化语义分割旨在在未见的目标域上保持鲁棒性能。视觉基础模型提供了丰富的多域知识，可以增强泛化能力。然而，主动利用VFMs中丰富子空间结构的策略仍被探索不足，许多现有方法主要关注保留预训练知识。此外，它们的LoRA组件往往 suffer from limited representational diversity and inefficient parameter utilization。我们提出RecycleLoRA，通过采用秩揭示QR分解（RRQR）来系统化地利用VFM的子空间结构并增强LoRA的表示丰富度。我们的主适配器利用RRQR识别的次要子空间方向来学习多样且独立的特征，即使单独使用也能实现有竞争力的性能。我们进一步引入了一个子适配器，通过最小调整精细优化主要方向，为主适配器的强大基线性能提供互补改进。这种设计使得双适配器能够学习不同的表示，而无需额外的正则化损失。我们通过基于RRQR的初始化对预训练子空间结构的系统化利用，实现了优越的域泛化性能。RecycleLoRA在合成到真实泛化和真实到真实泛化任务上均达到了最先进的性能，无需复杂的架构或额外的推理延迟。

Abstract

Domain Generalized Semantic Segmentation (DGSS) aims to maintain robust performance across unseen target domains. Vision Foundation Models (VFMs) offer rich multi-domain knowledge that can enhance generalization. However, strategies for actively exploiting the rich subspace structures within VFMs remain under-explored, with many existing methods focusing primarily on preserving pre-trained knowledge. Furthermore, their LoRA components often suffer from limited representational diversity and inefficient parameter utilization. We propose RecycleLoRA, which addresses both challenges by employing Rank-Revealing QR Decomposition (RRQR) to systematically exploit VFM's subspace structures and enhance LoRA's representational richness. Our main adapter leverages minor subspace directions identified by RRQR to learn diverse and independent features, achieving competitive performance even when used alone. We further introduce a sub adapter that carefully refines major directions with minimal adjustments, providing complementary improvements to the main adapter's strong baseline performance. This design enables the dual adapters to learn distinct representations without requiring additional regularization losses. Our systematic exploitation of pre-trained subspace structures through RRQR-based initialization leads to superior domain generalization performance. RecycleLoRA achieves state-of-the-art performance on both synthetic-to-real generalization and real-to-real generalization tasks without complex architectures or additional inference latency.

item.title: Approximation of symmetric total variation on point clouds
item.author: Stefano Almi, Anna Kubin, Emanuele Tasso
item.description:
来源: arxiv | ⭐ 与研究主题相关

GPT 基础摘要

总结: 研究图上对称全变差的近似问题，提出了一种基于随机采样点云的离散对称有限差分模型。

背景: 对图上的对称全变差函数进行近似研究。

目的: 通过随机采样参考概率测度得到的点云，定义离散对称有限差分模型来近似对称全变差。

方法: 使用随机采样点云定义离散对称有限差分模型，并确定点分布的适当缩放。

主要发现: 确定了保证几乎必然Γ-收敛到各向异性加权对称全变差的点分布缩放。

结论: 在适当的点分布缩放下，离散模型能近似收敛到各向异性加权对称全变差。

翻译: 本文研究了图上对称全变差泛函的近似问题。这种近似通过定义在随机采样参考概率测度得到的点云上的离散对称有限差分模型给出。我们确定了点分布的适当缩放，这些缩放保证了几乎必然Γ-收敛到各向异性加权对称全变差。

深度解读

这篇论文主要想解决什么问题？这个问题在现实或研究中为什么重要？: 这篇论文主要解决如何在随机采样的点云上近似对称全变分函数，并证明其收敛到连续极限的问题。这在研究中很重要，因为它将标量情况推广到了向量情况，为断裂力学和线性弹性等领域的离散变分模型提供了数学基础。在现实中，这有助于处理机器学习、图像处理和材料科学中基于点云数据的变分问题。

作者是如何思考并设计出这个方法的？是否有借鉴现有工作？: 作者将点云自然地建模为加权图，其中点构成顶点，距离足够近的点之间有边。他们设计了一个基于对称有限差分的离散泛函，通过引入核函数和特定的尺度因子来控制点之间的交互作用，从而逼近连续的对称全变差。该方法借鉴了 [15, 10] 和 [16] 等现有工作，特别是将标量情形扩展到了向量情形，并参考了断裂力学中的变分模型作为动机。

这个方法的核心思想是什么？整体实现流程是怎样的？: 该方法的核心思想是通过构建离散的图模型来近似连续的对称全变差泛函，利用核函数定义点云中点之间的相互作用权重。整体实现流程是：首先从参考概率测度中随机采样得到点云；其次利用核函数和尺度参数定义点之间的权重；接着构建离散的对称全变差泛函；最后在满足特定条件下，证明该离散模型收敛到连续的各向异性加权对称全变差。

论文的关键创新点有哪些？相比之前的工作，有什么不同？: 论文的主要创新点在于提出了点云上对称全变差的离散近似模型，并确定了点分布的缩放比例以实现几乎必然的Γ-收敛。相比之前处理标量总变差的工作，该研究将模型扩展到了向量设置，引入了投影项来处理向量差值，从而导致了对称导数类型的总变差泛函。此外，为了在极限中重构这种对称导数，所需的缩放条件比之前的标量设置更强。

如果要用一句话总结这篇论文的贡献，你会怎么说？: 本文提出了一种基于点云的离散模型来近似对称全变差，并证明了该模型在特定条件下收敛于各向异性加权对称全变差泛函。

Abstract

The paper investigates the approximation of the symmetric Total Variation functional on graphs. Such an approximation is given in terms of a discrete and symmetric finite difference model defined on point clouds obtained by randomly sampling a reference probability measure. We identify suitable scalings of the point distribution that guarantee an almost surely $Γ$-convergence to an anisotropic weighted symmetric Total Variation.

item.title: ToLL: Topological Layout Learning with Structural Multi-view Augmentation for 3D Scene Graph Pretraining
item.author: Yucheng Huang, Luping Ji, Xiangwei Jiang, Wen Li, Mao Ye
item.description:
来源: arxiv | ⭐ 与研究主题相关

GPT 基础摘要

总结: 提出了一种名为ToLL的3D Scene Graph预训练框架，旨在解决现有方法在数据稀缺和标签依赖方面的局限性

背景: 3D Scene Graph生成在空间理解和语义感知中至关重要，但现有方法受限于数据稀缺，且依赖标签或强先验，缺乏无标签的自监督代理任务

目的: 为了弥合这一差距，提出一种无标签且鲁棒的自监督代理任务，用于3D Scene Graph的微调

方法: 设计了锚点条件拓扑几何推理，利用GNN和稀疏锚点的空间先验恢复零中心子图的全局布局，并通过谓词特征严格调节该过程；构建了结构多视图增强以避免语义损坏，并通过自蒸馏增强表示

主要发现: 在3DSSG数据集上的广泛实验表明，ToLL能够提高表示质量，优于最先进的基线

结论: ToLL框架在3D Scene Graph预训练中表现优异

翻译: 3D Scene Graph (3DSG) 生成在空间理解和语义感知中起着关键作用。然而，其泛化能力往往受到数据稀缺的限制。当前的解决方案主要关注跨模态辅助表示学习和基于对象的生成预训练。前者严重依赖谓词注释，而后者由于强对象先验，可能会绕过谓词学习。因此，它们通常无法提供无标签且鲁棒的自监督代理任务，用于3DSG微调。为了弥合这一差距，我们提出了一种用于3DSG预训练的拓扑布局学习框架。具体来说，我们设计了一种锚点条件拓扑几何推理，利用GNN通过稀疏锚点的空间先验恢复零中心子图的全局布局。该过程严格由谓词特征调节，从而强制执行谓词关系学习。此外，我们构建了结构多视图增强以避免语义损坏，并通过自蒸馏增强表示。在3DSSG数据集上的广泛实验表明，我们的ToLL可以提高表示质量，优于最先进的基线。

深度解读

这篇论文主要想解决什么问题？这个问题在现实或研究中为什么重要？: 论文主要解决 3D 场景图生成中因数据稀缺导致的泛化能力受限问题。现有方法往往依赖标注或存在“几何捷径”，导致模型无法有效学习物体间的拓扑关系。3D 场景图是空间理解和语义感知的关键，对于视觉语言导航和机器人等下游任务至关重要。解决此问题能提升模型在无标注数据下的泛化能力，从而更准确地理解场景中的物体关系和功能。

作者是如何思考并设计出这个方法的？是否有借鉴现有工作？: 作者发现现有方法依赖标注或存在几何捷径，导致泛化差。他们借鉴了自编码器和 SwAV 的思想。他们设计了锚点条件拓扑几何推理来强制模型仅通过拓扑关系恢复布局，并采用结构多视图增强来避免语义损坏。

这个方法的核心思想是什么？整体实现流程是怎样的？: 该方法的核心思想是提出一种拓扑布局学习框架，通过锚点条件拓扑几何推理强制模型仅通过拓扑路径恢复全局布局，从而避免几何捷径，同时利用结构多视图增强防止语义损坏。整体流程包括：首先将点云投影到规范坐标系，利用锚点初始化和相对几何约束，通过循环传播机制逐步恢复节点状态；随后基于扩散模型根据恢复的潜在特征重建密集几何结构；最后通过结构多视图增强和自蒸馏提升表示的鲁棒性。

论文的关键创新点有哪些？相比之前的工作，有什么不同？: 论文的关键创新点在于提出了Topological Layout Learning (ToLL)框架，包含两个核心模块：一是Anchor-Conditioned Topological Geometry Reasoning (ACTGR)，通过信息瓶颈强制模型仅通过拓扑路径恢复布局，防止利用空间先验的捷径；二是Structural Multi-view Augmentation (SMA)，通过连接性扰动而非几何扭曲来生成视图，避免语义损坏。相比之前工作，ToLL解决了现有方法因依赖标注、易受几何变换影响或存在几何捷径而导致泛化能力受限的问题。

如果要用一句话总结这篇论文的贡献，你会怎么说？: 本文提出了一种名为 ToLL 的框架，通过锚点条件拓扑几何推理和结构多视图增强，解决了 3D 场景图生成中的数据稀缺和几何捷径问题，从而提升了模型性能。

Abstract

3D Scene Graph (3DSG) generation plays a pivotal role in spatial understanding and semantic-affordance perception. However, its generalizability is often constrained by data scarcity. Current solutions primarily focus on cross-modal assisted representation learning and object-centric generation pre-training. The former relies heavily on predicate annotations, while the latter's predicate learning may be bypassed due to strong object priors. Consequently, they could not often provide a label-free and robust self-supervised proxy task for 3DSG fine-tuning. To bridge this gap, we propose a Topological Layout Learning (ToLL) for 3DSG pretraining framework. In detail, we design an Anchor-Conditioned Topological Geometry Reasoning, with a GNN to recover the global layout of zero-centered subgraphs by the spatial priors from sparse anchors. This process is strictly modulated by predicate features, thereby enforcing the predicate relation learning. Furthermore, we construct a Structural Multi-view Augmentation to avoid semantic corruption, and enhancing representations via self-distillation. The extensive experiments on 3DSSG dataset demonstrate that our ToLL could improve representation quality, outperforming state-of-the-art baselines.

item.title: PReD: An LLM-based Foundation Multimodal Model for Electromagnetic Perception, Recognition, and Decision
item.author: Zehua Han, Jing Xiao, Yiqi Duan, Mengyu Xiang, Yuheng Ji, Xiaolong Zheng, Chenghanyu Zhang, Zhendong She, Junyu Shen, Dingwei Tan, Shichu Sun, Zhou Cong, Mingxuan Liu, Fengxiang Wang, Jinping Sun, Yangang Sun
item.description:
来源: arxiv

GPT 基础摘要

总结: 提出首个电磁领域基础模型PReD，构建高质量多任务数据集PReD-1.3M及评估基准PReD-Bench，支持信号检测、调制识别等核心任务，实现端到端信号理解与决策。

背景: 多模态大语言模型在通用领域表现强大，但在电磁领域面临数据稀缺和领域知识整合不足的挑战。

目的: 提出首个电磁领域基础模型PReD，构建高质量多任务数据集PReD-1.3M及评估基准PReD-Bench，以解决电磁领域的数据稀缺和知识整合问题。

方法: 构建包含原始时域波形、频域频谱图和星座图等多视角表示的高质量多任务电磁数据集PReD-1.3M；建立评估基准PReD-Bench；采用多阶段训练策略统一多任务；实现从信号理解到语言驱动决策的闭环优化。

主要发现: PReD在PReD-Bench上达到最先进性能，该基准基于开源和自收集信号数据集构建；实验结果验证了视觉对齐基础模型在推进电磁信号理解和推理方面的可行性和潜力。

结论: PReD作为首个电磁领域基础模型，通过多阶段训练策略和高质量数据集，显著增强了电磁领域专业知识，同时保持了通用多模态能力，证明了视觉对齐基础模型在电磁信号理解和推理方面的可行性。

翻译: Multimodal Large Language Models have demonstrated powerful cross-modal understanding and reasoning capabilities in general domains. However, in the electromagnetic (EM) domain, they still face challenges such as data scarcity and insufficient integration of domain knowledge. This paper proposes PReD, the first foundation model for the EM domain that covers the intelligent closed-loop of

Abstract

Multimodal Large Language Models have demonstrated powerful cross-modal understanding and reasoning capabilities in general domains. However, in the electromagnetic (EM) domain, they still face challenges such as data scarcity and insufficient integration of domain knowledge. This paper proposes PReD, the first foundation model for the EM domain that covers the intelligent closed-loop of "perception, recognition, decision-making." We constructed a high-quality multitask EM dataset, PReD-1.3M, and an evaluation benchmark, PReD-Bench. The dataset encompasses multi-perspective representations such as raw time-domain waveform, frequency-domain spectrograms, and constellation diagrams, covering typical features of communication and radar signals. It supports a range of core tasks, including signal detection, modulation recognition, parameter estimation, protocol recognition, radio frequency fingerprint recognition, and anti-jamming decision-making. PReD adopts a multi-stage training strategy that unifies multiple tasks for EM signals. It achieves closed-loop optimization from end-to-end signal understanding to language-driven reasoning and decision-making, significantly enhancing EM domain expertise while maintaining general multimodal capabilities. Experimental results show that PReD achieves state-of-the-art performance on PReD-Bench constructed from both open-source and self-collected signal datasets. These results collectively validate the feasibility and potential of vision-aligned foundation models in advancing the understanding and reasoning of EM signals.

item.title: Beyond Cosine Similarity: Zero-Initialized Residual Complex Projection for Aspect-Based Sentiment Analysis
item.author: Yijin Wang, Fandi Sun
item.description:
来源: arxiv

GPT 基础摘要

总结: 本文提出了一种基于量子投影和纠缠概念的Aspect-Based Sentiment Analysis (ABSA)新框架，通过零初始化残差复数投影和抗碰撞掩码角度损失来解决表示纠缠和假负碰撞问题。

背景: ABSA面临表示纠缠的挑战，即方面语义和情感极性在实值嵌入空间中经常被混淆；此外，标准对比学习在高频方面上遭受假负碰撞，严重降低性能。

目的: 提出一种新颖的框架，旨在通过将文本特征投影到复数语义空间来系统地利用相位来解纠缠情感极性，同时允许幅度编码语义强度和词汇丰富度，并解决碰撞瓶颈。

方法: 引入了零初始化残差复数投影（ZRCP）和抗碰撞掩码角度损失，将文本特征投影到复数语义空间，利用相位解纠缠情感，利用幅度编码语义信息，并引入抗碰撞掩码以保持极性内方面凝聚力并扩大极性间判别间隔。

主要发现: 该框架在Macro-F1分数上达到了0.8851的SOTA水平；深度几何分析表明，显式惩罚复数幅度会导致主观表示灾难性过正则化，证明了无约束幅度和相位驱动目标对于稳健、细粒度情感解纠缠至关重要。

结论: 该框架有效解决了表示纠缠和假负碰撞问题，通过相位驱动和无约束幅度策略实现了细粒度情感解纠缠，证明了其优于传统方法。

翻译: 基于方面的情感分析（ABSA）本质上受到表示纠缠的挑战，其中方面语义和情感极性在实值嵌入空间中经常被混淆。此外，标准对比学习遭受假负碰撞的困扰，严重降低高频方面的性能。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的框架，其特征是零初始化残差复数投影（ZRCP）和抗碰撞掩码角度损失，受到量子投影和纠缠概念的启发。我们的方法将文本特征投影到复数语义空间，系统地利用相位来解纠缠情感极性，同时允许幅度编码主观描述的语义强度和词汇丰富度。为了解决碰撞瓶颈，我们引入了一种抗碰撞掩码，优雅地保持了极性内方面凝聚力，并将极性间判别间隔扩大了50%以上。实验结果表明，我们的框架实现了0.8851的SOTA Macro-F1分数。深度几何分析进一步表明，显式惩罚复数幅度会导致主观表示灾难性过正则化，证明我们的无约束幅度和相位驱动目标对于稳健、细粒度情感解纠缠至关重要。

Abstract

Aspect-Based Sentiment Analysis (ABSA) is fundamentally challenged by representation entanglement, where aspect semantics and sentiment polarities are often conflated in real-valued embedding spaces. Furthermore, standard contrastive learning suffers from false-negative collisions, severely degrading performance on high-frequency aspects. In this paper, we propose a novel framework featuring a Zero-Initialized Residual Complex Projection (ZRCP) and an Anti-collision Masked Angle Loss,inspired by quantum projection and entanglement ideas. Our approach projects textual features into a complex semantic space, systematically utilizing the phase to disentangle sentiment polarities while allowing the amplitude to encode the semantic intensity and lexical richness of subjective descriptions. To tackle the collision bottleneck, we introduce an anti-collision mask that elegantly preserves intra-polarity aspect cohesion while expanding the inter-polarity discriminative margin by over 50%. Experimental results demonstrate that our framework achieves a state-of-the-art Macro-F1 score of 0.8851. Deep geometric analyses further reveal that explicitly penalizing the complex amplitude catastrophically over-regularizes subjective representations, proving that our unconstrained-amplitude and phase-driven objective is crucial for robust, fine-grained sentiment disentanglement.

item.title: Ghost-FWL: A Large-Scale Full-Waveform LiDAR Dataset for Ghost Detection and Removal
item.author: Kazuma Ikeda, Ryosei Hara, Rokuto Nagata, Ozora Sako. Zihao Ding, Takahiro Kado, Ibuki Fujioka, Taro Beppu, Mariko Isogawa, Kentaro Yoshioka
item.description:
来源: arxiv | ⭐ 与研究主题相关

GPT 基础摘要

总结: 本文提出了一种基于全波形激光雷达数据的移动场景幽灵点去除方法，并发布了首个大规模移动FWL数据集Ghost-FWL。

背景: LiDAR在自动驾驶、机器人和智慧城市应用中至关重要，但玻璃和反射表面产生的多路径激光回波导致的幽灵点严重降低了3D建图和定位精度。

目的: 解决移动LiDAR稀疏、动态数据上幽灵点去除的难题，利用全波形LiDAR捕获完整时间强度轮廓而非仅峰值距离来区分幽灵点和真实反射。

方法: 提出了Ghost-FWL数据集，包含24K帧、10个多样化场景、750亿个峰值级标注，建立了基于FWL的基线模型，并提出了FWL-MAE用于FWL数据的自监督表示学习。

主要发现: 基线模型在幽灵点去除准确性上优于现有方法；幽灵点去除进一步增强了下游任务，如LiDAR SLAM轨迹误差减少66%，3D目标检测误报减少50倍。

结论: FWL数据集和代码已公开，实验证明该方法能有效提升SLAM和目标检测性能。

翻译: 本文提出了一种基于全波形激光雷达数据的移动场景幽灵点去除方法，并发布了首个大规模移动FWL数据集Ghost-FWL。

深度解读

这篇论文主要想解决什么问题？这个问题在现实或研究中为什么重要？: 这篇论文主要解决激光雷达数据中由玻璃或反射材料引起的“幽灵点”检测与去除问题。现有方法难以处理移动激光雷达的稀疏动态数据，而全波形激光雷达能提供区分幽灵与真实反射的关键线索。该问题在自动驾驶、机器人和智慧城市应用中至关重要。幽灵点会导致3D地图重建错误、定位崩溃以及目标检测中的误报，严重影响系统的安全性和可靠性。

作者是如何思考并设计出这个方法的？是否有借鉴现有工作？: 作者意识到现有的基于几何一致性的方法无法处理移动 LiDAR 的稀疏数据，因此转向利用全波形 LiDAR (FWL) 捕获的完整脉冲信号轮廓，以获取区分真实反射与虚假幽灵的强度和时间线索。他们借鉴了现有的测距和自监督学习方法，但将其任务从单纯的测距转变为基于物理原因对反射峰值进行分类，并设计了专门针对 FWL 数据的掩码自编码器 (FWL-MAE) 来学习特征。

这个方法的核心思想是什么？整体实现流程是怎样的？: 该方法的核心思想是利用全波形 LiDAR (FWL) 数据，它捕获完整的时间强度轮廓，而不仅仅是距离，从而提供区分真实反射与虚假“幽灵”反射的线索。这解决了传统方法在移动 LiDAR 系统中因几何线索稀疏而失效的问题。整体实现流程包括：首先开发自定义系统提取原始 FWL 数据，并在 10 个室内外场景中收集了 24,000 多帧，标注了 75 亿个峰值；其次提出基于变换器的模型进行幽灵检测与移除，并引入 FWL-MAE 进行自监督学习；最后利用清理后的数据增强 SLAM 和 3D 目标检测等下游任务。

论文的关键创新点有哪些？相比之前的工作，有什么不同？: 论文的关键创新点包括：提出了首个大规模移动全波形激光雷达数据集 Ghost-FWL，包含大量峰值级标注；提出了首个基于全波形数据的幽灵点去除基线模型；提出了 FWL-MAE 掩码自编码器用于高效自监督学习。相比之前的工作，本文利用全波形数据捕获完整时间强度轮廓，提供区分幽灵的线索，解决了之前方法依赖静态、高密度扫描几何一致性在移动激光雷达上失效的问题，且现有数据集多为静态或缺乏峰值级标注。

如果要用一句话总结这篇论文的贡献，你会怎么说？: 本文提出了首个大规模移动全波形 LiDAR 数据集 Ghost-FWL，用于检测和去除由玻璃反射引起的“幽灵点”。基于该数据集，作者建立了基于全波形的幽灵去除基线模型，并提出了 FWL-MAE 自监督学习方法，显著提升了 SLAM 和 3D 检测等下游任务的性能。

Abstract

LiDAR has become an essential sensing modality in autonomous driving, robotics, and smart-city applications. However, ghost points (or ghosts), which are false reflections caused by multi-path laser returns from glass and reflective surfaces, severely degrade 3D mapping and localization accuracy. Prior ghost removal relies on geometric consistency in dense point clouds, failing on mobile LiDAR's sparse, dynamic data. We address this by exploiting full-waveform LiDAR (FWL), which captures complete temporal intensity profiles rather than just peak distances, providing crucial cues for distinguishing ghosts from genuine reflections in mobile scenarios. As this is a new task, we present Ghost-FWL, the first and largest annotated mobile FWL dataset for ghost detection and removal. Ghost-FWL comprises 24K frames across 10 diverse scenes with 7.5 billion peak-level annotations, which is 100x larger than existing annotated FWL datasets. Benefiting from this large-scale dataset, we establish a FWL-based baseline model for ghost detection and propose FWL-MAE, a masked autoencoder for efficient self-supervised representation learning on FWL data. Experiments show that our baseline outperforms existing methods in ghost removal accuracy, and our ghost removal further enhances downstream tasks such as LiDAR-based SLAM (66% trajectory error reduction) and 3D object detection (50x false positive reduction). The dataset and code is publicly available and can be accessed via the project page: https://keio-csg.github.io/Ghost-FWL

item.title: DiffAttn: Diffusion-Based Drivers' Visual Attention Prediction with LLM-Enhanced Semantic Reasoning
item.author: Weimin Liu, Qingkun Li, Jiyuan Qiu, Wenjun Wang, Joshua H. Meng
item.description:
来源: arxiv

GPT 基础摘要

总结: DiffAttn是一个基于扩散模型的框架，用于预测驾驶员的视觉注意力，通过结合Swin Transformer编码器、特征融合金字塔解码器和大型语言模型层来捕捉局部和全局场景特征，并在四个公共数据集上取得了最先进的性能。

背景: 驾驶员的视觉注意力为预测潜在危险提供了关键线索，并直接影响决策和控制操作，其缺失会危及交通安全。

目的: 为了模拟驾驶员的感知模式并推进智能车辆的视觉注意力预测，提出DiffAttn框架。

方法: DiffAttn采用扩散模型将任务表述为条件扩散去噪过程，使用Swin Transformer作为编码器，设计结合特征融合金字塔的解码器，并引入大型语言模型层以增强自上而下的语义推理和对安全关键线索的敏感性。

主要发现: 在四个公共数据集上的广泛实验表明，DiffAttn实现了最先进的性能，超越了大多数基于视频、自上而下特征驱动和LLM增强的基线。

结论: 该框架支持可解释的以驾驶员为中心的场景理解，并有望改善智能车辆中的车内人机交互、风险感知和驾驶员状态测量。

翻译: DiffAttn是一个基于扩散模型的框架，用于预测驾驶员的视觉注意力，通过结合Swin Transformer编码器、特征融合金字塔解码器和大型语言模型层来捕捉局部和全局场景特征，并在四个公共数据集上取得了最先进的性能。

Abstract

Drivers' visual attention provides critical cues for anticipating latent hazards and directly shapes decision-making and control maneuvers, where its absence can compromise traffic safety. To emulate drivers' perception patterns and advance visual attention prediction for intelligent vehicles, we propose DiffAttn, a diffusion-based framework that formulates this task as a conditional diffusion-denoising process, enabling more accurate modeling of drivers' attention. To capture both local and global scene features, we adopt Swin Transformer as encoder and design a decoder that combines a Feature Fusion Pyramid for cross-layer interaction with dense, multi-scale conditional diffusion to jointly enhance denoising learning and model fine-grained local and global scene contexts. Additionally, a large language model (LLM) layer is incorporated to enhance top-down semantic reasoning and improve sensitivity to safety-critical cues. Extensive experiments on four public datasets demonstrate that DiffAttn achieves state-of-the-art (SoTA) performance, surpassing most video-based, top-down-feature-driven, and LLM-enhanced baselines. Our framework further supports interpretable driver-centric scene understanding and has the potential to improve in-cabin human-machine interaction, risk perception, and drivers' state measurement in intelligent vehicles.

item.title: Multimodal-NF: A Wireless Dataset for Near-Field Low-Altitude Sensing and Communications
item.author: Mengyuan Li, Qianfan Lu, Jiachen Tian, Hongjun Hu, Yu Han, Xiao Li, Chao-Kai Wen, Shi Jin
item.description:
来源: arxiv | ⭐ 与研究主题相关

GPT 基础摘要

总结: Multimodal-NF 是一个大规模数据集和生成框架，用于 6G 网络中低空 XL-MIMO 系统的近场多模态数据生成。

背景: 现有数据集局限于二维地面远场场景，缺乏 3D 空间上下文和近场特征，这对低空大规模 MIMO 系统至关重要。

目的: 弥合现有数据集与 6G 网络需求之间的差距，提供支持低空 XL-MIMO 系统的数据。

方法: Multimodal-NF 在中高频段运行，同步高保真近场信道状态信息（CSI）和精确无线标签（如波束索引、视距/非视距），并与 RGB 图像、激光雷达点云和 GPS 等综合感官模态相结合。

主要发现: 多模态先验提供了空间语义，有助于减少近场搜索空间，从而降低无线传感和通信任务的开销。

结论: 通过代表性案例研究验证了数据集的效用和有效性，且开源生成器和数据集已提供。

翻译: 环境感知的 6G 无线网络需要深度整合多模态和无线数据。然而，大多数现有数据集局限于二维地面远场场景，缺乏对低空超大规模多输入多输出（XL-MIMO）系统至关重要的 3D 空间上下文和近场特征。为了填补这一差距，本文介绍了 Multimodal-NF，一个大规模数据集和专用生成框架。它在中高频段运行，将高保真近场信道状态信息（CSI）和精确无线标签（如前 5 波束索引、视距/非视距）与综合感官模态（RGB 图像、激光雷达点云和 GPS）同步。关键在于，这些多模态先验提供了空间语义，有助于减少近场搜索空间，从而降低无线传感和通信任务的开销。最后，我们通过代表性案例研究验证了数据集的效用和有效性。开源生成器和数据集可在 https://lmyxxn.github.io/6GXLMIMODatasets/ 获取。

深度解读

这篇论文主要想解决什么问题？这个问题在现实或研究中为什么重要？: 论文主要想解决现有数据集局限于2D地面远场场景、缺乏3D空间背景和近场特征的问题，特别是针对低空大规模MIMO系统。这个问题在研究中很重要，因为它是6G无线网络和低空经济的关键驱动力，且AI优化通信系统严重依赖海量高质量数据。此外，多模态数据能提供空间语义，帮助减少近场搜索空间，从而降低感知和通信任务的计算开销。

作者是如何思考并设计出这个方法的？是否有借鉴现有工作？: 作者意识到现有数据集局限于2D地面远场场景，缺乏3D空间背景和近场特征，因此设计了Multimodal-NF来弥合这一差距。他们开发了一个开源生成器，模拟低空XL-MIMO系统，同步高保真近场信道信息和多模态数据（如RGB、LiDAR）。作者借鉴了现有工作，如DeepSense6G和DeepMIMO，指出了它们在物理设置、远场假设或3D动态支持上的局限性。

这个方法的核心思想是什么？整体实现流程是怎样的？: 核心思想是结合无线数据与感官数据，利用多模态先验提供空间语义，从而减少近场搜索空间，降低无线感知和通信任务的复杂度。整体实现流程包括：首先构建包含道路、建筑和地形的3D场景，并预设10种无人机飞行轨迹；接着利用Sionna射线追踪引擎生成高保真的近场信道状态信息及无线标签；最后同步生成RGB图像、LiDAR点云和GPS数据，构建包含多模态信息的大规模数据集。

论文的关键创新点有哪些？相比之前的工作，有什么不同？: 关键创新点包括：提出了可定制的3D近场生成器；构建了大规模多模态数据集，同步高保真无线数据与感官信息；利用多模态先验减少搜索空间以降低任务开销。相比之前的工作，现有数据集多局限于2D地面远场场景，缺乏3D空间背景和近场特征；而该工作针对Upper Midband，捕捉了3D近场特征，并提供了包含视觉、雷达等多模态的丰富数据。

如果要用一句话总结这篇论文的贡献，你会怎么说？: 该论文提出了一个名为Multimodal-NF的大规模数据集，旨在解决6G低空XL-MIMO系统缺乏3D近场上下文的问题，该数据集同步了高保真无线信道数据与RGB图像、LiDAR点云等多模态信息，为环境感知和通信任务提供了训练基础。

Abstract

Environment-aware 6G wireless networks demand the deep integration of multimodal and wireless data. However, most existing datasets are confined to 2D terrestrial far-field scenarios, lacking the 3D spatial context and near-field characteristics crucial for low-altitude extremely large-scale multiple-input multiple-output (XL-MIMO) systems. To bridge this gap, this letter introduces Multimodal-NF, a large-scale dataset and specialized generation framework. Operating in the upper midband, it synchronizes high-fidelity near-field channel state information (CSI) and precise wireless labels (e.g., Top-5 beam indices, LoS/NLoS) with comprehensive sensory modalities (RGB images, LiDAR point clouds, and GPS). Crucially, these multimodal priors provide spatial semantics that help reduce the near-field search space and thereby lower the overhead of wireless sensing and communication tasks. Finally, we validate the dataset through representative case studies, demonstrating its utility and effectiveness. The open-source generator and dataset are available at https://lmyxxn.github.io/6GXLMIMODatasets/.

item.title: Learning from imperfect quantum data via unsupervised domain adaptation with classical shadows
item.author: Kosuke Ito, Akira Tanji, Hiroshi Yano, Yudai Suzuki, Naoki Yamamoto
item.description:
来源: arxiv

GPT 基础摘要

总结: 本文提出了一种利用无监督域适应框架从不完美的量子数据中学习的方法，通过经典阴影表示在经典计算管道中实现。

背景: 在实际场景中，目标域的量子数据往往缺乏干净和完全标记的样本，导致训练数据与部署环境下的条件不匹配。

目的: 解决现有方法中常见的假设问题，通过无监督域适应框架从不完美的量子数据中学习。

方法: 利用经典阴影技术获取量子态的经典表示，并在量子状态测量完成后，完全在经典计算管道中执行无监督域适应。

主要发现: 在物质量子相和纠缠分类任务中，该方法在现实域偏移下优于仅使用源域的非自适应基线和仅使用目标域的无监督学习方法。

结论: 该方法展示了域适应在实际量子数据学习中的实用性和优越性。

翻译: Learning from quantum data using classical machine learning models has emerged as a promising paradigm toward realizing quantum advantages. Despite extensive analyses on their performance, clean and fully labeled quantum data from the target domain are often unavailable in practical scenarios, forcing models to be trained on data collected under conditions that differ from those encountered at deployment. This mismatch highlights the need for new approaches beyond the common assumptions of prior work. In this work, we address this issue by employing an unsupervised domain adaptation framework for learning from imperfect quantum data. Specifically, by leveraging classical representations of quantum states obtained via classical shadows, we perform unsupervised domain adaptation entirely within a classical computational pipeline once measurements on the quantum states are executed. We numerically evaluate the framework on quantum phases of matter and entanglement classification tasks under realistic domain shifts. Across both tasks, our method outperforms source-only non-adaptive baselines and target-only unsupervised learning approaches, demonstrating the practical applicability of domain adaptation to realistic quantum data learning.

Abstract

Learning from quantum data using classical machine learning models has emerged as a promising paradigm toward realizing quantum advantages. Despite extensive analyses on their performance, clean and fully labeled quantum data from the target domain are often unavailable in practical scenarios, forcing models to be trained on data collected under conditions that differ from those encountered at deployment. This mismatch highlights the need for new approaches beyond the common assumptions of prior work. In this work, we address this issue by employing an unsupervised domain adaptation framework for learning from imperfect quantum data. Specifically, by leveraging classical representations of quantum states obtained via classical shadows, we perform unsupervised domain adaptation entirely within a classical computational pipeline once measurements on the quantum states are executed. We numerically evaluate the framework on quantum phases of matter and entanglement classification tasks under realistic domain shifts. Across both tasks, our method outperforms source-only non-adaptive baselines and target-only unsupervised learning approaches, demonstrating the practical applicability of domain adaptation to realistic quantum data learning.

item.title: DinoDental: Benchmarking DINOv3 as a Unified Vision Encoder for Dental Image Analysis
item.author: Kun Tang, Xinquan Yang, Mianjie Zheng, Xuefen Liu, Xuguang Li, Xiaoqi Guo, Ruihan Chen, Linlin Shen, He Meng
item.description:
来源: arxiv

GPT 基础摘要

总结: DinoDental是一个统一基准，用于评估DINOv3作为牙科图像分析可靠编码器的性能，涵盖分类、检测和实例分割任务。

背景: 牙科成像中专家标注稀缺且成本高昂，限制了AI在牙科领域的发展。

目的: 构建DinoDental基准，系统评估DINOv3在无需特定领域预训练的情况下，作为牙科图像分析可靠编码器的适用性。

方法: DinoDental由多个公共数据集构建，涵盖全景片和口内照片的分类、检测和实例分割任务。研究分析了模型在不同规模、输入分辨率下的迁移性能，并比较了冻结特征、全微调和参数高效低秩适应LoRA等适应策略。

主要发现: DINOv3在全景片和口内照片分析中均表现强劲，在口内图像理解和边界敏感的密集预测任务中优势明显。

结论: DinoDental为全面评估DINOv3在牙科分析中提供了系统框架，为牙科AI社区的高效模型选择和适应提供了基础基准。

翻译: 牙科成像中专家标注的稀缺性和高成本给AI在牙科领域的发展带来了重大挑战。DINOv3是一种最先进的自监督视觉基础模型，在17亿张图像上进行了预训练，为缓解这一问题提供了有前景的途径。然而，将其迁移到具有独特成像特征和临床细微差别的牙科领域时，其可靠性尚不清楚。为此，我们介绍了DinoDental，这是一个统一基准，旨在系统评估DINOv3是否可以作为无需特定领域预训练的综合牙科图像分析的可靠即插即用编码器。DinoDental由多个公共数据集构建，涵盖全景片和口内照片的分类、检测和实例分割等多种任务。我们进一步通过缩放模型规模和输入分辨率，以及比较冻结特征、全微调和参数高效的低秩适应LoRA方法等适应策略，分析了模型的迁移性能。我们的实验表明，DINOv3可以作为全景片和口内照片牙科图像分析的强大统一编码器，在各项任务中保持竞争力，并在口内图像理解和边界敏感的密集预测方面显示出特别明显的优势。DinoDental共同为在牙科分析中全面评估DINOv3提供了系统框架，为牙科AI社区的高效和有效的模型选择和适应建立了基础基准。

Abstract

The scarcity and high cost of expert annotations in dental imaging present a significant challenge for the development of AI in dentistry. DINOv3, a state-of-the-art, self-supervised vision foundation model pre-trained on 1.7 billion images, offers a promising pathway to mitigate this issue. However, its reliability when transferred to the dental domain, with its unique imaging characteristics and clinical subtleties, remains unclear. To address this, we introduce DinoDental, a unified benchmark designed to systematically evaluate whether DINOv3 can serve as a reliable, off-the-shelf encoder for comprehensive dental image analysis without requiring domain-specific pre-training. Constructed from multiple public datasets, DinoDental covers a wide range of tasks, including classification, detection, and instance segmentation on both panoramic radiographs and intraoral photographs. We further analyze the model's transfer performance by scaling its size and input resolution, and by comparing different adaptation strategies, including frozen features, full fine-tuning, and the parameter-efficient Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) method. Our experiments show that DINOv3 can serve as a strong unified encoder for dental image analysis across both panoramic radiographs and intraoral photographs, remaining competitive across tasks while showing particularly clear advantages for intraoral image understanding and boundary-sensitive dense prediction. Collectively, DinoDental provides a systematic framework for comprehensively evaluating DINOv3 in dental analysis, establishing a foundational benchmark to guide efficient and effective model selection and adaptation for the dental AI community.

item.title: Prototype-Enhanced Multi-View Learning for Thyroid Nodule Ultrasound Classification
item.author: Yangmei Chen, Zhongyuan Zhang, Xikun Zhang, Xinyu Hao, Mingliang Hou, Renqiang Luo, Ziqi Xu
item.description:
来源: arxiv

GPT 基础摘要

总结: 提出了一种名为PEMV-thyroid的原型增强多视图学习框架，用于解决甲状腺结节超声图像分类中的异质性挑战，通过多视图表示学习和原型级引导提升模型鲁棒性和泛化能力。

背景: 甲状腺结节超声图像分类对早期诊断和临床决策至关重要，但现有深度学习方法在不同超声设备或临床环境部署时表现出鲁棒性和泛化能力有限，主要归因于甲状腺超声图像的显著异质性。

目的: 针对甲状腺超声图像的显著异质性，提出PEMV-thyroid框架，以学习互补表示并优化决策边界，从而提升模型在异质成像条件下的稳定表示学习能力。

方法: PEMV-thyroid框架通过多视图学习从多个特征视角学习互补表示，并利用基于原型的修正机制结合混合原型信息来细化决策边界。

主要发现: 在多个甲状腺超声数据集上的广泛实验表明，PEMV-thyroid在跨设备和跨域评估场景中持续优于最先进的方法，提高了诊断准确性和泛化性能。

结论: PEMV-thyroid通过整合多视图表示与原型级引导，在异质成像条件下实现了更稳定的表示学习，显著提升了真实临床环境中的诊断准确性和泛化能力。

翻译: Thyroid nodule classification using ultrasound imaging is essential for early diagnosis and clinical decision-making; however, despite promising performance on in-distribution data, existing deep learning methods often exhibit limited robustness and generalisation when deployed across different ultrasound devices or clinical environments. This limitation is mainly attributed to the pronounced heterogeneity of thyroid ultrasound images, which can lead models to capture spurious correlations rather than reliable diagnostic cues. To address this challenge, we propose PEMV-thyroid, a Prototype-Enhanced Multi-View learning framework that accounts for data heterogeneity by learning complementary representations from multiple feature perspectives and refining decision boundaries through a prototype-based correction mechanism with mixed prototype information. By integrating multi-view representations with prototype-level guidance, the proposed approach enables more stable representation learning under heterogeneous imaging conditions. Extensive experiments on multiple thyroid ultrasound datasets demonstrate that PEMV-thyroid consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods, particularly in cross-device and cross-domain evaluation scenarios, leading to improved diagnostic accuracy and generalisation performance in real-world clinical settings. The source code is available at https://github.com/chenyangmeii/Prototype-Enhanced-Multi-View-Learning.

Abstract

Thyroid nodule classification using ultrasound imaging is essential for early diagnosis and clinical decision-making; however, despite promising performance on in-distribution data, existing deep learning methods often exhibit limited robustness and generalisation when deployed across different ultrasound devices or clinical environments. This limitation is mainly attributed to the pronounced heterogeneity of thyroid ultrasound images, which can lead models to capture spurious correlations rather than reliable diagnostic cues. To address this challenge, we propose PEMV-thyroid, a Prototype-Enhanced Multi-View learning framework that accounts for data heterogeneity by learning complementary representations from multiple feature perspectives and refining decision boundaries through a prototype-based correction mechanism with mixed prototype information. By integrating multi-view representations with prototype-level guidance, the proposed approach enables more stable representation learning under heterogeneous imaging conditions. Extensive experiments on multiple thyroid ultrasound datasets demonstrate that PEMV-thyroid consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods, particularly in cross-device and cross-domain evaluation scenarios, leading to improved diagnostic accuracy and generalisation performance in real-world clinical settings. The source code is available at https://github.com/chenyangmeii/Prototype-Enhanced-Multi-View-Learning.

item.title: Beyond Scanpaths: Graph-Based Gaze Simulation in Dynamic Scenes
item.author: Luke Palmer, Petar Palasek, Hazem Abdelkawy
item.description:
来源: arxiv

GPT 基础摘要

总结: 该研究提出了一种基于自回归动态系统的注视建模方法，通过直接处理原始注视轨迹来捕捉注视动态，并结合注视历史和不断变化的环境进行建模。

背景: 准确建模人类注视对于众多计算机视觉应用至关重要，特别是在汽车安全领域。现有方法通常将注视简化为显著性图或扫描路径，仅隐式地处理注视动态。

目的: 将注视建模表述为自回归动态系统，显式地展开随时间变化的原始注视轨迹，并预测下一步的注视分布。

方法: 研究采用注视中心图表示驾驶场景，利用亲和关系变换器（ART）处理异构图，该图模型了驾驶员注视、交通物体和道路结构之间的相互作用。此外，引入了对象密度网络（ODN）来预测下一步注视分布，并发布了包含30名参与者注视数据的Focus100数据集。

主要发现: 在原始注视数据上直接训练，无需注视过滤，该方法生成的注视轨迹、扫描路径动态和显著性图比现有注意力模型更自然。

结论: 该方法为动态环境中人类注意力的时间建模提供了有价值的见解。

翻译: 准确建模人类注视对于众多计算机视觉应用至关重要，特别是在汽车安全领域。现有方法通常将注视简化为显著性图或扫描路径，仅隐式地处理注视动态。我们将其表述为自回归动态系统，并显式地展开随时间变化的原始注视轨迹，同时以注视历史和不断变化的环境为条件。驾驶场景被表示为注视中心图，由亲和关系变换器（ART）处理，这是一种异构图变换器，用于建模驾驶员注视、交通物体和道路结构之间的相互作用。我们进一步引入了对象密度网络（ODN）来预测下一步注视分布，捕捉复杂环境中注意力转移的随机性和以对象为中心的性质。我们还发布了Focus100，这是一个新的数据集，包含30名参与者观看自驾驶视频时的原始注视数据。在原始注视上直接训练，无需注视过滤，我们的统一方法生成的注视轨迹、扫描路径动态和显著性图比现有的注意力模型更自然，为动态环境中人类注意力的时间建模提供了有价值的见解。

Abstract

Accurately modelling human attention is essential for numerous computer vision applications, particularly in the domain of automotive safety. Existing methods typically collapse gaze into saliency maps or scanpaths, treating gaze dynamics only implicitly. We instead formulate gaze modelling as an autoregressive dynamical system and explicitly unroll raw gaze trajectories over time, conditioned on both gaze history and the evolving environment. Driving scenes are represented as gaze-centric graphs processed by the Affinity Relation Transformer (ART), a heterogeneous graph transformer that models interactions between driver gaze, traffic objects, and road structure. We further introduce the Object Density Network (ODN) to predict next-step gaze distributions, capturing the stochastic and object-centric nature of attentional shifts in complex environments. We also release Focus100, a new dataset of raw gaze data from 30 participants viewing egocentric driving footage. Trained directly on raw gaze, without fixation filtering, our unified approach produces more natural gaze trajectories, scanpath dynamics, and saliency maps than existing attention models, offering valuable insights for the temporal modelling of human attention in dynamic environments.

item.title: Kernel-Smith: A Unified Recipe for Evolutionary Kernel Optimization
item.author: He Du, Qiming Ge, Jiakai Hu, Aijun Yang, Zheng Cai, Zixian Huang, Sheng Yuan, Qinxiu Cheng, Xinchen Xie, Yicheng Chen, Yining Li, Jiaxing Xie, Huanan Dong, Yaguang Wu, Xiangjun Huang, Jian Yang, Hui Wang, Bowen Zhou, Bowen Li, Qipeng Guo, Kai Chen
item.description:
来源: hf

GPT 基础摘要

总结: Kernel-Smith 是一个高性能 GPU 内核和算子生成框架，结合了稳定的评估驱动进化代理和面向进度的后训练方法。

背景: 为了解决 GPU 内核和算子生成的高性能需求，以及适应不同硬件平台如 NVIDIA GPUs 和 MetaX GPUs。

目的: 构建一个统一的进化协议框架，用于在 KernelBench 上实现最先进的性能，并在 MetaX MACA 后端上验证，同时将 LLM 驱动的内核优化从受控评估转移到实际部署。

方法: Kernel-Smith 维护可执行候选种群，利用高性能和多样化程序档案及结构化执行反馈进行迭代改进；构建后端特定的评估服务；将长 horizon 进化轨迹转换为以步骤为中心的监督和强化学习信号，使模型在进化循环内优化为强大的局部改进器。

主要发现: Kernel-Smith-235B-RL 在 KernelBench 上达到最先进的整体性能，优于 Gemini-3.0-pro 和 Claude-4.6-opus；Kernel-Smith-MACA-30B 超越 DeepSeek-V3.2-think 和 Qwen3-235B-2507-think；该工作流为 SGLang 和 LMDeploy 等生产系统做出了上游贡献。

结论: LLM 驱动的内核优化可以从受控评估成功转移到实际部署，证明了该框架在不同异构平台上的潜在适应性和实用性。

翻译: 我们提出了 Kernel-Smith，这是一个高性能 GPU 内核和算子生成框架，结合了稳定的评估驱动进化代理和面向进度的后训练方法。在代理方面，Kernel-Smith 维护可执行候选种群，并利用高性能和多样化程序档案以及编译、正确性和加速的结构化执行反馈对其进行迭代改进。为了使这种搜索可靠，我们为 NVIDIA GPU 上的 Triton 和 MetaX GPU 上的 Maca 构建了后端特定的评估服务。在训练方面，我们将长 horizon 进化轨迹转换为以步骤为中心的监督和强化学习信号，通过保留正确性保持的高增益修订，使模型在进化循环内优化为强大的局部改进器，而不是作为一次性生成器。在统一的进化协议下，Kernel-Smith-235B-RL 在 KernelBench 上实现了最先进的整体性能，取得了最佳的平均加速比，并优于包括 Gemini-3.0-pro 和 Claude-4.6-opus 在内的前沿专有模型。我们进一步在 MetaX MACA 后端上验证了该框架，我们的 Kernel-Smith-MACA-30B 超越了 DeepSeek-V3.2-think 和 Qwen3-235B-2507-think 等大规模竞争对手，突出了在异构平台间无缝适应的潜力。除了基准测试结果外，相同的工作流还为 SGLang 和 LMDeploy 等生产系统做出了上游贡献，证明了 LLM 驱动的内核优化可以从受控评估转移到实际部署。

深度解读

这篇论文主要想解决什么问题？这个问题在现实或研究中为什么重要？: 论文主要想解决当前基于大语言模型的方法难以在单次生成后保持可靠优化的问题。现有的 LLM 在生成高性能 GPU 内核时，往往难以超越“一次生成”的局限，且容易受早期决策限制，导致探索多样性不足。这个问题很重要，因为高性能内核对于将现代加速器的硬件能力转化为实际吞吐量至关重要。无论是大型模型训练推理，还是科学计算和工业部署，都依赖高效的算子实现来发挥硬件潜力。

作者是如何思考并设计出这个方法的？是否有借鉴现有工作？: 作者认为现有 LLM 方法难以维持单次生成后的可靠优化，因此设计了 Kernel-Smith 框架。他们借鉴了 AlphaEvolve 的进化搜索思想，将模型训练为进化循环中的“强局部改进器”，而非一次性生成器，并利用重复测量等技术减少评估噪声。是的，作者借鉴了现有工作，在代理框架上参考了 AlphaEvolve、Astra 和 CudaForge 等系统，在训练上参考了 AutoTriton 的 RLVR 方法，在基准测试上参考了 KernelBench 等。

这个方法的核心思想是什么？整体实现流程是怎样的？: 该方法的核心思想是将大模型训练为进化循环中的局部改进器，而非一次性生成器，通过维护候选程序种群并利用结构化执行反馈来迭代优化内核。整体实现流程包括：系统首先维护一个候选程序种群，代理根据参考实现和档案库样本提出新内核；随后，自动化的评估后端执行生成的代码，检查编译状态、正确性及加速效果，并采用预热执行和多次测量来减少GPU计时噪声；最后，通过从进化轨迹中提取高增益的优化步骤来训练模型，使其在进化循环中更有效地改进代码。

论文的关键创新点有哪些？相比之前的工作，有什么不同？: 该论文的关键创新点在于：一是提出了一个稳定的评估驱动型进化代理框架，通过维护候选程序种群和档案来迭代优化；二是设计了面向进化的后训练配方，将长时序进化轨迹转化为步骤级的监督和强化学习信号，使模型成为进化循环中的强局部改进器；三是建立了针对不同硬件后端的稳定评估服务，以抑制执行噪声并检测作弊。相比之前的工作，不同之处在于：之前的 LLM 方法通常难以在单次生成后维持可靠的优化，且多轮细化容易将后续提议锚定在早期决策上。Kernel-Smith 将模型优化目标从一次性生成器转变为进化循环内的强局部改进器，从而实现了更有效的迭代优化。

如果要用一句话总结这篇论文的贡献，你会怎么说？: Kernel-Smith 提出了一种结合进化代理与后训练配方的框架，通过保留高增益改进步骤将模型训练为进化循环中的局部改进者，从而在 GPU 内核优化上实现了最先进的性能。

Abstract

We present Kernel-Smith, a framework for high-performance GPU kernel and operator generation that combines a stable evaluation-driven evolutionary agent with an evolution-oriented post-training recipe. On the agent side, Kernel-Smith maintains a population of executable candidates and iteratively improves them using an archive of top-performing and diverse programs together with structured execution feedback on compilation, correctness, and speedup. To make this search reliable, we build backend-specific evaluation services for Triton on NVIDIA GPUs and Maca on MetaX GPUs. On the training side, we convert long-horizon evolution trajectories into step-centric supervision and reinforcement learning signals by retaining correctness-preserving, high-gain revisions, so that the model is optimized as a strong local improver inside the evolutionary loop rather than as a one-shot generator. Under a unified evolutionary protocol, Kernel-Smith-235B-RL achieves state-of-the-art overall performance on KernelBench with Nvidia Triton backend, attaining the best average speedup ratio and outperforming frontier proprietary models including Gemini-3.0-pro and Claude-4.6-opus. We further validate the framework on the MetaX MACA backend, where our Kernel-Smith-MACA-30B surpasses large-scale counterparts such as DeepSeek-V3.2-think and Qwen3-235B-2507-think, highlighting potential for seamless adaptation across heterogeneous platforms. Beyond benchmark results, the same workflow produces upstream contributions to production systems including SGLang and LMDeploy, demonstrating that LLM-driven kernel optimization can transfer from controlled evaluation to practical deployment.

item.title: AutoCut: End-to-end advertisement video editing based on multimodal discretization and controllable generation
item.author: Milton Zhou, Sizhong Qin, Yongzhi Li, Quan Chen, Peng Jiang
item.description:
来源: arxiv

GPT 基础摘要

总结: AutoCut是一个端到端的广告视频编辑框架，通过多模态离散化和可控编辑，支持视频选择、脚本生成和背景音乐选择等任务，将预测的令牌序列转换为可部署的长视频输出。

背景: 短视频已成为数字广告的主要媒介，但当前工作流程和AI工具相互独立且模态特定，导致制作成本高和整体效率低。

目的: 解决当前工作流程和AI工具相互独立且模态特定的问题，降低制作成本和迭代时间，提高一致性和可控性，实现可扩展的视频创作。

方法: AutoCut采用专用编码器提取视频和音频特征，应用残差向量量化将其离散化为与文本表示对齐的统一令牌，构建共享的视频-音频-文本令牌空间；基于基础模型，通过多模态对齐和监督微调开发多模态大语言模型进行视频编辑；最后，完整的制作管道将预测的令牌序列转换为可部署的长视频输出。

主要发现: 在真实世界广告数据集上的实验表明，AutoCut减少了制作成本和迭代时间，并显著提高了一致性和可控性。

结论: AutoCut为可扩展的视频创作铺平了道路。

翻译: Short-form videos have become a primary medium for digital advertising, requiring scalable and efficient content creation. However, current workflows and AI tools remain disjoint and modality-specific, leading to high production costs and low overall efficiency. To address this issue, we propose AutoCut, an end-to-end advertisement video editing framework based on multimodal discretization and controllable editing. AutoCut employs dedicated encoders to extract video and audio features, then applies residual vector quantization to discretize them into unified tokens aligned with textual representations, constructing a shared video-audio-text token space. Built upon a foundation model, we further develop a multimodal large language model for video editing through combined multimodal alignment and supervised fine-tuning, supporting tasks covering video selection and ordering, script generation, and background music selection within a unified editing framework. Finally, a complete production pipeline converts the predicted token sequences into deployable long video outputs. Experiments on real-world advertisement datasets show that AutoCut reduces production cost and iteration time while substantially improving consistency and controllability, paving the way for scalable video creation.

Abstract

Short-form videos have become a primary medium for digital advertising, requiring scalable and efficient content creation. However, current workflows and AI tools remain disjoint and modality-specific, leading to high production costs and low overall efficiency. To address this issue, we propose AutoCut, an end-to-end advertisement video editing framework based on multimodal discretization and controllable editing. AutoCut employs dedicated encoders to extract video and audio features, then applies residual vector quantization to discretize them into unified tokens aligned with textual representations, constructing a shared video-audio-text token space. Built upon a foundation model, we further develop a multimodal large language model for video editing through combined multimodal alignment and supervised fine-tuning, supporting tasks covering video selection and ordering, script generation, and background music selection within a unified editing framework. Finally, a complete production pipeline converts the predicted token sequences into deployable long video outputs. Experiments on real-world advertisement datasets show that AutoCut reduces production cost and iteration time while substantially improving consistency and controllability, paving the way for scalable video creation.

item.title: Marco DeepResearch: Unlocking Efficient Deep Research Agents via Verification-Centric Design
item.author: Bin Zhu, Qianghuai Jia, Tian Lan, Junyang Ren, Feng Gu, Feihu Jiang, Longyue Wang, Zhao Xu, Weihua Luo
item.description:
来源: hf

GPT 基础摘要

总结: Marco DeepResearch是一个深度研究代理，通过三个层面的验证中心框架设计来提高长时任务中的可靠性。

背景: 现有的深度研究代理在长时任务中面临瓶颈，主要源于QA数据合成、轨迹构建和测试时扩展中缺乏显式验证机制，导致错误传播和性能下降。

目的: 为了解决现有范式中的瓶颈，提出Marco DeepResearch，通过验证中心框架设计来提高长时任务中的可靠性。

方法: 在三个层面进行优化：1) QA数据合成中引入验证机制；2) 轨迹构建中设计验证驱动的轨迹合成方法；3) 测试时扩展中使用Marco DeepResearch本身作为验证器。

主要发现: Marco DeepResearch在大多数具有挑战性的基准测试中显著优于8B规模的深度研究代理，在600次工具调用预算下甚至超过了或接近了30B规模的代理。

结论: 提出的Marco DeepResearch代理在长时任务中表现出色，验证中心框架设计有效解决了现有范式中的瓶颈问题。

翻译: Marco DeepResearch是一个深度研究代理，通过三个层面的验证中心框架设计来提高长时任务中的可靠性。

深度解读

这篇论文主要想解决什么问题？这个问题在现实或研究中为什么重要？: 这篇论文主要解决现有深度研究代理缺乏显式验证机制的问题，导致错误在训练和推理过程中传播并降低性能。这个问题之所以重要，是因为在长期任务中，缺乏验证会导致代理过早接受错误的中间结果，从而无法可靠地解决复杂的现实世界问题。

作者是如何思考并设计出这个方法的？是否有借鉴现有工作？: 作者通过观察现有深度研究代理在长任务中因缺乏显式验证导致错误传播的问题，提出了一个以验证为中心的框架。该方法在QA数据合成、轨迹构建和测试时扩展三个层面进行优化。作者借鉴了现有的深度研究代理系统、数据合成方法以及ReAct范式，但指出了它们在验证方面的不足。

这个方法的核心思想是什么？整体实现流程是怎样的？: 该方法的核心思想是采用“以验证为中心”的设计框架，通过在数据合成、轨迹构建和推理时扩展三个阶段引入显式验证机制，来控制问题难度、确保答案唯一且正确，并防止错误传播，从而提升代理在长跨度任务中的性能。整体实现流程包括：在数据合成阶段，利用对抗性验证和生成-执行-验证循环生成高质量数据；在轨迹构建阶段，通过多代理架构和失败轨迹的反思重放来修复错误；在推理阶段，利用代理自身作为验证器对挑战性问题进行持续推理和验证，以有效扩展计算资源。

论文的关键创新点有哪些？相比之前的工作，有什么不同？: 论文的核心创新是提出了验证中心的设计框架，在数据合成、轨迹构建和测试时扩展三个层面引入显式验证机制。具体包括在数据合成中采用对抗性验证和生成-执行-验证循环以确保答案质量，在轨迹构建中设计多代理验证框架和反思重新回放，以及在测试时利用代理自身作为验证器。相比之前的工作，该研究主要解决了现有范式缺乏显式验证导致错误传播的瓶颈，通过在训练和推理全流程中强化验证，显著提升了代理的性能。

如果要用一句话总结这篇论文的贡献，你会怎么说？: 本文提出了Marco DeepResearch，通过在数据合成、轨迹构建和推理时扩展三个层面引入验证机制，显著提升了深度研究代理的性能。

Abstract

Deep research agents autonomously conduct open-ended investigations, integrating complex information retrieval with multi-step reasoning across diverse sources to solve real-world problems. To sustain this capability on long-horizon tasks, reliable verification is critical during both training and inference. A major bottleneck in existing paradigms stems from the lack of explicit verification mechanisms in QA data synthesis, trajectory construction, and test-time scaling. Errors introduced at each stage propagate downstream and degrade the overall agent performance. To address this, we present Marco DeepResearch, a deep research agent optimized with a verification-centric framework design at three levels: \textbf{(1)~QA Data Synthesis:} We introduce verification mechanisms to graph-based and agent-based QA synthesis to control question difficulty while ensuring answers are unique and correct; \textbf{(2)~Trajectory Construction:} We design a verification-driven trajectory synthesis method that injects explicit verification patterns into training trajectories; and \textbf{(3)~Test-time scaling:} We use Marco DeepResearch itself as a verifier at inference time and effectively improve performance on challenging questions. Extensive experimental results demonstrate that our proposed Marco DeepResearch agent significantly outperforms 8B-scale deep research agents on most challenging benchmarks, such as BrowseComp and BrowseComp-ZH. Crucially, under a maximum budget of 600 tool calls, Marco DeepResearch even surpasses or approaches several 30B-scale agents, like Tongyi DeepResearch-30B.

item.title: EdgeDiT: Hardware-Aware Diffusion Transformers for Efficient On-Device Image Generation
item.author: Sravanth Kodavanti, Manjunath Arveti, Sowmya Vajrala, Srinivas Miriyala, Vikram N R
item.description:
来源: arxiv

GPT 基础摘要

总结: EdgeDiT是一种专为移动端神经处理单元设计的硬件高效生成式Transformer，通过识别和剪枝结构冗余实现了轻量化，在保持性能的同时显著降低了计算复杂度和延迟。

背景: Diffusion Transformers (DiT)在高质量图像合成方面取得了新的最先进成果，但其巨大的计算复杂度和内存需求阻碍了其在资源受限的边缘设备上的本地部署。

目的: 介绍EdgeDiT，这是一个专为移动端神经处理单元（如Qualcomm Hexagon和Apple Neural Engine）设计的硬件高效生成式Transformer家族。

方法: 利用硬件感知优化框架，系统地识别并剪枝DiT骨干网络中特别消耗移动端数据流的结构冗余，从而实现轻量化模型。

主要发现: EdgeDiT在参数减少20-30%、FLOPs减少36-46%以及设备端延迟降低1.65倍的同时，未牺牲原始Transformer架构的可扩展性或表达能力；在FID和推理延迟的帕累托最优权衡上优于优化的移动U-Net和原始DiT变体。

结论: EdgeDiT通过在设备端实现响应迅速、私密且离线的生成式AI，为将大规模基础模型从高端GPU转移到用户手中提供了可扩展的蓝图。

翻译: Diffusion Transformers (DiT)在高保真图像合成方面建立了新的最先进水平；然而，其巨大的计算复杂度和内存需求阻碍了在资源受限的边缘设备上进行本地部署。在本文中，我们介绍了EdgeDiT，这是一个专为移动神经处理单元（NPU）设计的硬件高效生成式Transformer家族，如Qualcomm Hexagon和Apple Neural Engine (ANE)。通过利用硬件感知优化框架，我们系统地识别并剪枝了DiT骨干网络中特别消耗移动数据流的内部结构冗余。我们的方法产生了一系列轻量级模型，在参数减少20-30%、FLOPs减少36-46%以及设备端延迟降低1.65倍的同时，没有牺牲原始Transformer架构的可扩展性或表达能力。广泛的基准测试表明，与优化的移动U-Net和原始DiT变体相比，EdgeDiT在Fréchet Inception距离（FID）和推理延迟之间提供了优越的帕累托最优权衡。通过在设备端实现响应迅速、私密且离线的生成式AI，EdgeDiT为将大规模基础模型从高端GPU转移到用户手中提供了可扩展的蓝图。

Abstract

Diffusion Transformers (DiT) have established a new state-of-the-art in high-fidelity image synthesis; however, their massive computational complexity and memory requirements hinder local deployment on resource-constrained edge devices. In this paper, we introduce EdgeDiT, a family of hardware-efficient generative transformers specifically engineered for mobile Neural Processing Units (NPUs), such as the Qualcomm Hexagon and Apple Neural Engine (ANE). By leveraging a hardware-aware optimization framework, we systematically identify and prune structural redundancies within the DiT backbone that are particularly taxing for mobile data-flows. Our approach yields a series of lightweight models that achieve a 20-30% reduction in parameters, a 36-46% decrease in FLOPs, and a 1.65-fold reduction in on-device latency without sacrificing the scaling advantages or the expressive capacity of the original transformer architecture. Extensive benchmarking demonstrates that EdgeDiT offers a superior Pareto-optimal trade-off between Frechet Inception Distance (FID) and inference latency compared to both optimized mobile U-Nets and vanilla DiT variants. By enabling responsive, private, and offline generative AI directly on-device, EdgeDiT provides a scalable blueprint for transitioning large-scale foundation models from high-end GPUs to the palm of the user.

item.title: Unified Restoration-Perception Learning: Maritime Infrared-Visible Image Fusion and Segmentation
item.author: Weichao Cai, Weiliang Huang, Biao Xue, Chao Huang, Fei Yuan, Bob Zhang
item.description:
来源: arxiv

GPT 基础摘要

总结: 本文提出了一种多任务互补学习框架（MCLF）和红外-可见光海事船舶数据集（IVMSD），旨在解决海洋环境中图像退化对语义感知稳定性的影响。

背景: 海洋环境中的雾和强反射导致严重的图像退化，严重影响语义感知的稳定性。现有的修复和增强方法通常针对特定退化或仅关注视觉质量，缺乏同时改善结构恢复和语义效果的全端到端协作机制。此外，公开的红外-可见光数据集主要来自城市场景，无法捕捉海洋环境中耦合退化的真实特征。

目的: 为了解决海洋环境中的图像退化问题，提出红外-可见光海事船舶数据集（IVMSD）以覆盖各种天气和光照条件下的海事场景；构建多任务互补学习框架（MCLF），在统一架构中协同执行图像修复、多模态融合和语义分割。

方法: 提出了多任务互补学习框架（MCLF），包含频率-空间增强互补（FSEC）模块用于降质抑制和结构增强，语义-视觉一致性注意力（SVCA）模块用于语义一致性引导，以及跨模态引导注意力机制用于选择性融合。

主要发现: 在IVMSD数据集上的实验结果表明，提出的方法在复杂海事条件下实现了最先进的分割性能，显著提高了鲁棒性和感知质量。

结论: 该框架通过协同修复、融合和分割任务，有效提升了海洋环境下的图像质量和语义感知能力。

翻译: Marine scene understanding and segmentation plays a vital role in maritime monitoring and navigation safety. However, prevalent factors like fog and strong reflections in maritime environments cause severe image degradation, significantly compromising the stability of semantic perception. Existing restoration and enhancement methods typically target specific degradations or focus solely on visual quality, lacking end-to-end collaborative mechanisms that simultaneously improve structural recovery and semantic effectiveness. Moreover, publicly available infrared-visible datasets are predominantly collected from urban scenes, failing to capture the authentic characteristics of coupled degradations in marine environments. To address these challenges, the Infrared-Visible Maritime Ship Dataset (IVMSD) is proposed to cover various maritime scenarios under diverse weather and illumination conditions. Building upon this dataset, a Multi-task Complementary Learning Framework (MCLF) is proposed to collaboratively perform image restoration, multimodal fusion, and semantic segmentation within a unified architecture. The framework includes a Frequency-Spatial Enhancement Complementary (FSEC) module for degradation suppression and structural enhancement, a Semantic-Visual Consistency Attention (SVCA) module for semantic-consistent guidance, and a cross-modality guided attention mechanism for selective fusion. Experimental results on IVMSD demonstrate that the proposed method achieves state-of-the-art segmentation performance, significantly enhancing robustness and perceptual quality under complex maritime conditions.

Abstract

Marine scene understanding and segmentation plays a vital role in maritime monitoring and navigation safety. However, prevalent factors like fog and strong reflections in maritime environments cause severe image degradation, significantly compromising the stability of semantic perception. Existing restoration and enhancement methods typically target specific degradations or focus solely on visual quality, lacking end-to-end collaborative mechanisms that simultaneously improve structural recovery and semantic effectiveness. Moreover, publicly available infrared-visible datasets are predominantly collected from urban scenes, failing to capture the authentic characteristics of coupled degradations in marine environments. To address these challenges, the Infrared-Visible Maritime Ship Dataset (IVMSD) is proposed to cover various maritime scenarios under diverse weather and illumination conditions. Building upon this dataset, a Multi-task Complementary Learning Framework (MCLF) is proposed to collaboratively perform image restoration, multimodal fusion, and semantic segmentation within a unified architecture. The framework includes a Frequency-Spatial Enhancement Complementary (FSEC) module for degradation suppression and structural enhancement, a Semantic-Visual Consistency Attention (SVCA) module for semantic-consistent guidance, and a cross-modality guided attention mechanism for selective fusion. Experimental results on IVMSD demonstrate that the proposed method achieves state-of-the-art segmentation performance, significantly enhancing robustness and perceptual quality under complex maritime conditions.

item.title: Tele-Catch: Adaptive Teleoperation for Dexterous Dynamic 3D Object Catching
item.author: Weiguang Zhao, Junting Dong, Rui Zhang, Kailin Li, Qin Zhao, Kaizhu Huang
item.description:
来源: arxiv | ⭐ 与研究主题相关

GPT 基础摘要

总结: Tele-Catch是一个用于灵巧手在动态物体抓取任务中远程操作的系统性框架，旨在解决动态物体抓取中纯远程操作因时机、姿态和力误差而失败的问题。

背景: 大多数先前的研究针对的是静态物体，如抓取或操作，而动态物体抓取（即物体在接触前移动）仍然探索不足。纯远程操作在此任务中经常因时机、姿态和力误差而失败。

目的: 为了提高动态抓取任务的准确性和鲁棒性，提出Tele-Catch框架，实现人机协作的共享自主性。

方法: 提出了DAIM机制，通过将基于手套的远程操作信号融合到扩散策略的去噪过程中，实现共享自主性；引入DP-U3R，将点云观测中的无监督几何表示集成到扩散策略学习中，以增强策略的鲁棒性。

主要发现: Tele-Catch显著提高了动态抓取任务的准确性和鲁棒性，并且在不同的灵巧手形态和之前未见过的物体类别中表现出一致的增益。

结论: Tele-Catch框架有效解决了动态物体抓取中的挑战，通过共享自主性和几何感知决策，实现了更优的性能。

翻译: Tele-Catch是一个用于灵巧手在动态物体抓取任务中远程操作的系统性框架，旨在解决动态物体抓取中纯远程操作因时机、姿态和力误差而失败的问题。大多数先前的研究针对的是静态物体，如抓取或操作，而动态物体抓取（即物体在接触前移动）仍然探索不足。纯远程操作在此任务中经常因时机、姿态和力误差而失败。为了提高动态抓取任务的准确性和鲁棒性，提出Tele-Catch框架，实现人机协作的共享自主性。提出了DAIM机制，通过将基于手套的远程操作信号融合到扩散策略的去噪过程中，实现共享自主性；引入DP-U3R，将点云观测中的无监督几何表示集成到扩散策略学习中，以增强策略的鲁棒性。Tele-Catch显著提高了动态抓取任务的准确性和鲁棒性，并且在不同的灵巧手形态和之前未见过的物体类别中表现出一致的增益。Tele-Catch框架有效解决了动态物体抓取中的挑战，通过共享自主性和几何感知决策，实现了更优的性能。

深度解读

这篇论文主要想解决什么问题？这个问题在现实或研究中为什么重要？: 这篇论文主要解决在动态场景下，通过遥操作控制灵巧手抓取移动物体的难题。现有研究多针对静态物体，而动态抓取在现实交互中很常见但研究不足。纯遥操作容易因时机、姿态和力控制误差导致失败，因此需要结合人类意图与自主策略的共享自主机制来提高准确性和鲁棒性。

作者是如何思考并设计出这个方法的？是否有借鉴现有工作？: 作者观察到现有研究多针对静态物体，而动态抓取（如接住移动物体）被忽视。他们发现纯遥操作因时机、姿态和力误差容易失败，因此决定结合学习框架的稳定性和遥操作的灵活性。设计上，他们先训练RL策略获取技能，再利用点云数据训练DP-U3R以增强几何感知，最后通过DAIM机制将手套输入平滑融入扩散策略的去噪过程。作者借鉴了DexterityGen的权重注入思想，但指出其固定阈值会导致突变，且未利用视觉观察；同时也借鉴了DP3和ViViDex的点云表示方法。

这个方法的核心思想是什么？整体实现流程是怎样的？: 该方法的核心思想是解决动态抓取中纯遥操作的不足，提出了一种共享自主框架。它通过动态感知自适应集成机制，根据物体状态平滑地将人类手套输入与学习策略融合，同时利用无监督点云几何特征增强策略的鲁棒性。整体实现流程包括四个阶段：首先在模拟环境中训练一个强化学习策略以获取抓取技能；接着利用该策略收集大规模的状态、动作及点云数据；随后使用这些数据训练包含几何感知特征的扩散策略；最后在遥操作阶段，通过动态感知机制将手套信号注入去噪过程，实现自适应控制。

论文的关键创新点有哪些？相比之前的工作，有什么不同？: 论文提出了Tele-Catch框架，核心创新包括设计动态感知自适应集成机制（DAIM）以融合手套遥操作与扩散策略，以及引入DP-U3R将无监督点云几何特征集成到策略学习中。相比以往主要针对静态物体的研究，本文专注于动态抓取任务；且不同于使用固定阈值导致突然仲裁的旧方法，本文通过自适应调节实现平滑控制，并利用点云观察增强几何感知决策能力。

如果要用一句话总结这篇论文的贡献，你会怎么说？: 本文提出了Tele-Catch框架，通过设计动态感知自适应集成机制和无监督点云几何表示增强模块，实现了灵巧手在动态抓取任务中的人机协作，显著提升了操作的准确性和鲁棒性。

Abstract

Teleoperation is a key paradigm for transferring human dexterity to robots, yet most prior work targets objects that are initially static, such as grasping or manipulation. Dynamic object catch, where objects move before contact, remains underexplored. Pure teleoperation in this task often fails due to timing, pose, and force errors, highlighting the need for shared autonomy that combines human input with autonomous policies. To this end, we present Tele-Catch, a systematic framework for dexterous hand teleoperation in dynamic object catching. At its core, we design DAIM, a dynamics-aware adaptive integration mechanism that realizes shared autonomy by fusing glove-based teleoperation signals into the diffusion policy denoising process. It adaptively modulates control based on the interaction object state. To improve policy robustness, we introduce DP-U3R, which integrates unsupervised geometric representations from point cloud observations into diffusion policy learning, enabling geometry-aware decision making. Extensive experiments demonstrate that Tele-Catch significantly improves accuracy and robustness in dynamic catching tasks, while also exhibiting consistent gains across distinct dexterous hand embodiments and previously unseen object categories.

item.title: HISA: Efficient Hierarchical Indexing for Fine-Grained Sparse Attention
item.author: Yufei Xu, Fanxu Meng, Fan Jiang, Yuxuan Wang, Ruijie Zhou, Jiexi Wu, Zhixin Pan, Zhaohui Wang, Xiaojuan Tang, Wenjie Pei, Tongxuan Liu, Di yin, Xing Sun, Muhan Zhang
item.description:
来源: hf

GPT 基础摘要

总结: 本文提出了一种名为HISA的层级索引稀疏注意力机制，旨在解决现有稀疏注意力机制在处理长上下文时计算效率低的问题。

背景: 现有的Token级稀疏注意力机制（如DeepSeek Sparse Attention）通过轻量级索引器为每个查询评分并仅计算选中子集的注意力。然而，索引器仍需扫描整个前缀，导致每层O(L^2)的计算瓶颈，随着上下文长度增加变得不可行。

目的: 提出HISA作为索引器的即插即用替代方案，将搜索过程从扁平的Token扫描转变为两阶段层级过程，以提高效率。

方法: HISA采用两阶段层级搜索：首先通过块级粗过滤对池化块代表进行评分以修剪无关区域；然后在剩余候选块内应用原始索引器进行Token级细化。该方法无需额外训练，且保留了下游稀疏MLA算子所需的精确Token级Top-k稀疏模式。

主要发现: 在内核级基准测试中，HISA在32K上下文长度下实现2倍加速，在128K下实现4倍加速。在Needle-in-a-Haystack和LongBench测试中，直接将DeepSeek-V3.2中的索引器替换为HISA无需微调。HISA在质量上紧密匹配原始DSA，显著优于块稀疏基线。HISA和原始DSA生成的Token选择集合的平均IoU大于99%，表明效率提升几乎不影响选择保真度。

结论: HISA在保持与原始DSA几乎相同的注意力选择保真度的同时，显著提高了长上下文下的计算效率。

翻译: 本文提出了一种名为HISA的层级索引稀疏注意力机制，旨在解决现有稀疏注意力机制在处理长上下文时计算效率低的问题。现有的Token级稀疏注意力机制（如DeepSeek Sparse Attention）通过轻量级索引器为每个查询评分并仅计算选中子集的注意力。然而，索引器仍需扫描整个前缀，导致每层O(L^2)的计算瓶颈，随着上下文长度增加变得不可行。HISA采用两阶段层级搜索：首先通过块级粗过滤对池化块代表进行评分以修剪无关区域；然后在剩余候选块内应用原始索引器进行Token级细化。该方法无需额外训练，且保留了下游稀疏MLA算子所需的精确Token级Top-k稀疏模式。在内核级基准测试中，HISA在32K上下文长度下实现2倍加速，在128K下实现4倍加速。在Needle-in-a-Haystack和LongBench测试中，直接将DeepSeek-V3.2中的索引器替换为HISA无需微调。HISA在质量上紧密匹配原始DSA，显著优于块稀疏基线。HISA和原始DSA生成的Token选择集合的平均IoU大于99%，表明效率提升几乎不影响选择保真度。

深度解读

这篇论文主要想解决什么问题？这个问题在现实或研究中为什么重要？: 这篇论文主要解决的是在Token-level稀疏注意力机制中，索引器必须扫描整个前缀带来的性能瓶颈问题。随着上下文长度增加，这种全扫描方式会导致计算成本过高。这个问题很重要，因为长上下文窗口对于长文档理解和多轮推理至关重要，而HISA通过分层搜索在不改变最终选择质量的前提下，显著提升了效率。

作者是如何思考并设计出这个方法的？是否有借鉴现有工作？: 作者发现 token-level sparse attention 的 indexer 扫描整个前缀导致计算量随长度平方增长，于是思考能否在不改变最终稀疏模式的前提下减少搜索成本。他们设计了两阶段分层搜索：先通过块级粗过滤剔除不相关区域，再在候选块内进行 token 级细化。该方法借鉴了 MoBA 的强制包含策略以及近似最近邻搜索中的粗到细策略。

这个方法的核心思想是什么？整体实现流程是怎样的？: 该方法的核心思想是用两阶段分层搜索替换原始索引器中的扁平全前缀扫描，在保持最终选择 Token 集合不变的前提下降低搜索成本。整体实现流程包括：首先将前缀划分为块，计算每个块的池化代表向量；接着进行块级粗过滤，通过评分保留前 m 个候选块；最后在选定的块内进行 Token 级细化，对 Token 应用原始评分机制以确定最终结果。

论文的关键创新点有哪些？相比之前的工作，有什么不同？: 论文的关键创新点在于识别出token-level稀疏注意力的索引器是主要瓶颈，并提出了一种无需训练的两阶段分层搜索策略。该方法通过块级粗过滤和token级细化，在保持选择质量的同时大幅提升了速度。相比之前的工作，HISA不同于块稀疏方法，后者在重要块内无法修剪不相关token；也不同于DSA，DSA必须扫描整个前缀，而HISA通过分层搜索降低了搜索成本。此外，HISA将近似限制在搜索路径上，保留了下游注意力计算的精确性。

如果要用一句话总结这篇论文的贡献，你会怎么说？: 本文提出了一种名为 HISA 的分层索引稀疏注意力方法，通过两阶段搜索（块级粗过滤和 Token 级细化）替换了原有的扁平扫描，在保持与现有模型兼容且无需训练的前提下，显著降低了长上下文下的索引计算成本。

Abstract

Token-level sparse attention mechanisms, exemplified by DeepSeek Sparse Attention (DSA), achieve fine-grained key selection by scoring every historical token for each query using a lightweight indexer, and then computing attention only over the selected subset. While the downstream sparse attention scales efficiently, the indexer still scans the entire prefix for every query, introducing an O($L^2$) per-layer bottleneck that becomes prohibitive as context length grows. We propose HISA (Hierarchical Indexed Sparse Attention), a drop-in replacement for the indexer that transforms the search process from a flat token scan into a two-stage hierarchical procedure. First, a block-level coarse filter scores pooled block representatives to prune irrelevant regions. Then, a token-level refinement applies the original indexer only within the remaining candidate blocks. HISA preserves the exact token-level top-k sparsity pattern required by the downstream Sparse MLA operator and requires no additional training. On kernel-level benchmarks, HISA achieves a 2$\times$ speedup at 32K context length and 4$\times$ at 128K. On Needle-in-a-Haystack and LongBench, we directly replace the indexer in DeepSeek-V3.2 with HISA, without any fine-tuning. HISA closely matches the original DSA in quality while significantly outperforming block-sparse baselines. Moreover, the token selection sets produced by HISA and the original DSA exhibit a mean IoU greater than 99%, indicating that the efficiency gains come with virtually no impact on selection fidelity.

item.title: Detecting low left ventricular ejection fraction from ECG using an interpretable and scalable predictor-driven framework
item.author: Ya Zhou, Tianxiang Hao, Ziyi Cai, Haojie Zhu, Hejun He, Jia Liu, Xiaohan Fan, Jing Yuan
item.description:
来源: arxiv

GPT 基础摘要

总结: 提出了一种名为ECGPD-LEF的结构化框架，用于通过心电图检测左心室射血分数低的情况，该框架结合了基础模型诊断概率和可解释性建模，在多个数据集上表现良好，并实现了无需特定任务重新训练的零样本推理。

背景: 左心室射血分数低的情况经常在发展为有症状的心力衰竭之前未被检测到，因此需要可扩展的筛查策略。虽然人工智能心电图显示出了前景，但现有方法依赖于仅端到端的黑盒模型（可解释性有限）或依赖于商业心电图测量算法的表格系统（性能次优）。

目的: 介绍ECGPD-LEF，这是一种结构化框架，旨在整合基础模型衍生的诊断概率和可解释性建模，以从心电图检测左心室射血分数低。

方法: 该框架在包含72,475对心电图-超声心动图对的基准数据集EchoNext上进行了训练，并在预定义的独立内部（n=5,442）和外部（n=16,017）队列中进行了评估。

主要发现: 该框架在内部和外部队列中均实现了稳健的鉴别能力，在内部和外部队列中检测中度左心室射血分数低的AUROC分别为88.4%和86.8%，F1分别为64.5%和53.6%。该框架在人口统计学和临床亚组中始终优于基准提供的官方端到端基线。可解释性分析确定了高影响力的预测因子，包括正常心电图、不完全左束支传导阻滞和前外侧导联的室壁内损伤。值得注意的是，这些预测因子独立实现了无需特定任务重新训练的零样本推理。

结论: 该框架协调了预测性能与机制透明度，支持通过增加预测因子进行可扩展增强，并与现有的AI-ECG系统无缝集成。

翻译: 低左心室射血分数（LEF）经常在进展为有症状的心力衰竭之前保持未检测状态，这凸显了可扩展筛查策略的必要性。虽然人工智能心电图（AI-ECG）显示出前景，但现有方法依赖于仅端到端的黑盒模型（可解释性有限）或依赖于商业心电图测量算法的表格系统（性能次优）。我们介绍了基于心电图的预测驱动LEF（ECGPD-LEF），这是一种结构化框架，旨在整合基础模型衍生的诊断概率和可解释性建模，以从心电图检测LEF。该框架在包含72,475对心电图-超声心动图对的基准数据集EchoNext上进行了训练，并在预定义的独立内部（n=5,442）和外部（n=16,017）队列中进行了评估。我们的框架在内部和外部队列中均实现了稳健的鉴别能力，在内部和外部队列中检测中度LEF的AUROC分别为88.4%和86.8%，F1分别为64.5%和53.6%。该框架在人口统计学和临床亚组中始终优于基准提供的官方端到端基线。可解释性分析确定了高影响力的预测因子，包括正常心电图、不完全左束支传导阻滞和前外侧导联的室壁内损伤，这些因素驱动了LEF风险估计。值得注意的是，这些预测因子独立实现了无需特定任务重新训练的零样本推理（内部AUROC 75.3-81.0%；外部AUROC 71.6-78.6%），表明室壁功能障碍本质上是编码在结构化诊断概率表示中的。该框架协调了预测性能与机制透明度，支持通过增加预测因子进行可扩展增强，并与现有的AI-ECG系统无缝集成。

Abstract

Low left ventricular ejection fraction (LEF) frequently remains undetected until progression to symptomatic heart failure, underscoring the need for scalable screening strategies. Although artificial intelligence-enabled electrocardiography (AI-ECG) has shown promise, existing approaches rely solely on end-to-end black-box models with limited interpretability or on tabular systems dependent on commercial ECG measurement algorithms with suboptimal performance. We introduced ECG-based Predictor-Driven LEF (ECGPD-LEF), a structured framework that integrates foundation model-derived diagnostic probabilities with interpretable modeling for detecting LEF from ECG. Trained on the benchmark EchoNext dataset comprising 72,475 ECG-echocardiogram pairs and evaluated in predefined independent internal (n=5,442) and external (n=16,017) cohorts, our framework achieved robust discrimination for moderate LEF (internal AUROC 88.4%, F1 64.5%; external AUROC 86.8%, F1 53.6%), consistently outperforming the official end-to-end baseline provided with the benchmark across demographic and clinical subgroups. Interpretability analyses identified high-impact predictors, including normal ECG, incomplete left bundle branch block, and subendocardial injury in anterolateral leads, driving LEF risk estimation. Notably, these predictors independently enabled zero-shot-like inference without task-specific retraining (internal AUROC 75.3-81.0%; external AUROC 71.6-78.6%), indicating that ventricular dysfunction is intrinsically encoded within structured diagnostic probability representations.
